programme.desc: When Stuart’s favorite restaurant is about to close, he takes Phil along for one last meal, only to bump into Phil’s ex-wife who is now engaged. Holly is baffled by mixed signals from a cute co-worker. Haskell starts an online traffic school.

programme.title: The Exes

programme.desc: Man regrets buying '95 Thunderbird, sued by fiancée's ex-friend. Another man claims god brother's estranged wife towed his car. Dog handler sues former customers over Chihuahua cost due to alleged gift card fraud.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Relentless
programme.desc: A woman wages a psychological war against the person she believes killed her daughter.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Family Torn Apart

programme.title: 48 Hours: Prime Suspect
programme.desc: Billy Fox, 33, is a devoted father of two and a soccer coach. He appears to be an all-around regular guy. But he’s booked for the death of a baby. It's a charge that could put him in prison for the rest of his life.

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: 48 Hours: Decades of Deceit
programme.desc: An Internet-savvy investigator works to solve a decades-old murder case.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Pilot

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Old Man Out pt. 1

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Old Man Out pt. 2

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Memory
programme.desc: The IMF must undermine "the Butcher of the Balkans," Janos Karq, by having his head of security capture an agent, Sparrow, who will then incriminate Karq.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Operation Rogosh
programme.desc: Imry Rogosh is a mass murderer who kills to foment political upheaval. He is targeting Los Angeles, so the IMF knocks him out in a car accident.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle
programme.desc: Ton and Allen teach a cocky new auction hunter a lesson. They spot a 1940's-era shuffleboard table and uncover an early hot rod made from the fuel tank of a WWII fighter plane!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Betsy's Last Stand
programme.desc: With their beloved bread truck on life support, Ton and Allen head to an auction to help save her. Will an industrial grinder and a classic Chevy be enough to mend Betsy, or will the guys be forced to say goodbye for good?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Big Crush
programme.desc: The guys battle it out with their fierce former-employee, while a shill bidder threatens to ruin the day. When all hope seems lost, a set of monster truck tires and a mystery box are their last chance to come out on top.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Carnies & Armories
programme.desc: A tough group of bidders team up to take down Ton and Allen at auction. After a couple of wins, the guys try to sell an arsenal used by Native Americans and some vintage carnival gear. But will they get conned?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington

programme.desc: The guys take Big Sis to her first auction - and when things get ugly, she becomes their secret weapon. Ton tests out a "blob" and Allen gets shot with a riot gun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: During a bitter, lengthy Michigan winter, a young father vanishes. As spring arrives, a gruesome discovery is made. The harsh winter conditions may aid investigators in their quest for the truth.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: Detectives left no stone unturned in their investigation of the brutal murder of young Jessica Keen in a cold, damp Ohio cemetery.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Philpotts
programme.desc: When six children died in a house fire in Allenton, Derby in May 2012 it shocked the nation. Parents Mick and Mairead Philpott were charged with the murders. We uncover the reasons behind the arson attack on their own home.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Vancouver Island: Rivers of Life
programme.desc: Vancouver island is the largest island off the west coast of North America. Glaciers fuel the flow of some of Canada's tallest waterfalls, and an endless network of rivers and creeks provides the ideal habitat for the pacific salmon.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Caribbean: The Wild Side of Paradise
programme.desc: The Caribbean is a tropical paradise. From just a few meters wide, to hundreds of kilometers across, each of the over 7,000 islands are different, and each has its own unique wildlife.

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Malaysia: Freaks of Nature
programme.desc: Malaysia is one of a handful of countries in the world described as mega-diverse. Malaysia's animals and plants have exploited every opportunity to carve out an existence and so have adapted to some very strange ways of life.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Amazon River Islands: The Floating Forest

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Congo: the Untamed Heart

programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. With a black box controlled by his console, Dr. Claw schemes with the twin scientists, Null and Void, to intercept Metro City's bank transactions by manipulating their satellite transmissions.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Smelderado
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Dr. Stench, an agent of M.A.D., has invented a substance that makes gold smell terrible. Since smelly gold cannot be kept in bank vaults, it will be valueless in international markets.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: The Coo-Coo-Clock Caper

programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Chief Quimby reveals to Inspector Gadget a MAD plot to steal Metro City's gold. Inspector Gadget is instructed to proceed to the mint and stop the robbery while Penny and Brain follow.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. M.A.D. is supposed to be the cause of the disappearing ships in the Bermuda Triangle. Inspector Gadget, Penny and Brain find the missing ships.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Amusement Park
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. M.A.D. agents have hidden a bomb in the amusement park in Metro City. With the bomb set to go off in a halfhour, M.A.D. is holding the city for ransom. Inspector Gadget must find the bomb.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Snakin' All Over
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Inspector Gadget's mission is to guard a priceless coin collection from the evil clutches of M.A.D.

programme.title: Arthur: Elwood City Turns 100!
programme.desc: Arthur and his friends commemorate their 100th episode in style! Mr. Ratburn's class is chosen to stage a musical tribute to Elwood City for its centennial celebration, which quickly becomes a drama behind the curtain!

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'S Imaginary Friend/Arthur's Lost Library Book
programme.desc: Someone only D.W. can see has moved in with the Reads. Her name is Nadine, and she follows D.W. everywhere. Arthur is the first to get the new Scare-Your-Pants-Off book from the library. Unfortunately, he can't figure out where he put it!

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Birthday/Francine Frensky, Superstar
programme.desc: Only four more days until Arthur's birthday party! But to Arthur's horror, it turns out Muffy's having her birthday party on the very same day. And, now that Francine finally has the lead in a school play, she's has become a stage tyrant.

programme.title: Arthur: Cents-less/Buster the Lounge Lizard
programme.desc: Mr. Ratburn decides it's time for his class to learn a little about money. For the entire weekend, no one in the class can spend a cent. Buster has the brand-new Dark Bunny Dark Buggy, complete with grappling hook and voice commands!

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Cleats of Strength/Little Miss Meanie
programme.desc: When Francine needs money for new soccer cleats, Muffy hires her as a personal assistant. Lydia and Muffy join forces to defeat a mean beauty queen in the Little Miss Crocus" pageant.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Go For A Ride!
programme.desc: Barney and the children have fun playing with and learning about busses and cars.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Once Upon a Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Mario is trying to write his very own fairy tale. The children help by acting out some of their favorite fairy tales to give Mario some ideas.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Fountain of Fun
programme.desc: While Barney and the children wait for Mr. Boyd's new fountain to be delivered, they have fun playing in and exploring the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Baby Brother
programme.desc: Barney reminds Baby Bop and BJ that although babies start out little, they grow fast. Through pretend play, favorite songs and fun games, they learn about the many ways we grow every day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Home Sweet Earth
programme.desc: It's Earth Day, a great time for everyone to learn how to help take car of our world, but Ben is wasting paper while BJ isn't too concerned about cutting down a tree to make room for a new playground.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Who's Your Neighbor?
programme.desc: Through pretend play, Barney and the children learn about their community and the people that help them live safely and happily there.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: This Way In, This Way Out!
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Big Garden - Get Happy
programme.desc: Baby Bop wants Barney, BJ and the kids to play with her instead of working in their garden. They promise to play with her as soon as they finish. Baby Bop can't wait, and tries many ways to get them to come play with her now, none of which work.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Play Games!
programme.desc: It's fun and games with Barney and his friends! BJ's favorite way of getting exercise is by playing sports and games. When Baby Bop is shy about trying new games, Barney and his friends show her how tee-rific trying something new can be.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Kicker Beware
programme.desc: Megatron forces Demolishor to divulge the Autobots' secret of finding energon: Kicker.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Energon Grid
programme.desc: Megatron has taken yet another plan, to create three meteors from Unicron and propel them at Earth before the energon grid has been completed, which he feels will “strike fear in Optimus Prime.”

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Rodimus: Friend or Foe?
programme.desc: While Snow Cat tests his power against the Energon Grid by sending frozen asteroids, Megatron decides to go after Alpha Q instead of Earth after finding a Terrorcon spy.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Go For Unicron!
programme.desc: Optimus reveals their mission is twofold: they are also going to destroy Unicron, and they prepare to set up a space bridge.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Return of Demolishor
programme.desc: The Autobots face a new threat: for Demolisher is revived in a new power, who is tougher than ever.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: A Tale of Two Heroes
programme.desc: The Autobots continue on their journey and intercept a Decepticon warp signal which turns out to be Rodimus's ship. Rodimus asks permission to aboard and Optimus obliges.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Battle Stations
programme.desc: The autobots continue their planning on taking out Unicron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Alpha Q: Identity
programme.desc: Unicron's arrival causes the Decepticons on Cybertron to rebel, while Kicker learns the truth about Alpha Q.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Laser Wave: Rampage
programme.desc: Shockblast disables Cybertron's energon grid, while Kicker tries to convince the Autobots to listen to Alpha Q.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Survival Instincts
programme.desc: Starved for Energon, both Unicron's head and body begin lashing out at their respective captors.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Each One Fights…
programme.desc: Megatron commands Shockblast to lead an assault on Cybertron to take out the Energon towers, and allow Unicron to “feed” on Cybertron.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Luca, Anne & Barbara
programme.desc: Ready to take their relationship to the next level, Anne and Luca are looking for a budget dream home in the city. And while they agree on steering clear of the suburbs, their styles are miles apart.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Nicole & Colby
programme.desc: Nicole and Colby are hoping to find a picture-perfect dog-friendly home where they can put down roots and start a family. In the meantime, they’re squatting at a friend’s place and concerned they may never find a home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Nadine & Greg
programme.desc: With busy careers, three kids and another one on the way, Nadine and Greg have a hectic schedule. And now that he’s battling cancer, they’re more focused on family than ever before. They’ve outgrown their current nest.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Stephanie & David
programme.desc: Done living in his parents’ cramped basement, newlyweds Stephanie and David are on the hunt for their forever home. They know exactly what they want, but unfortunately their long wish list is beyond their budget.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Dionna & Natasha
programme.desc: A full-time teacher, student, and single mom, Dionna dreams of providing the best home possible for her young son. They’ve definitely outgrown her tiny apartment.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Aven and Philip
programme.desc: Engaged and taking on a host of major challenges, Aven and Phillip are ready to put down roots after recently relocating to his hometown. And in addition they are planning their wedding and starting a new business.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Making of Metalhead
programme.desc: Krang creates Metalhead, an exact robot replica of the Turtles with even more powers, and directs him to destroy the Turtles. Donatello, however, reprograms Metalhead over to the Turtles' side.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leatherhead Meets the Rat King
programme.desc: Leatherhead The Cajan gator goes into the sewers in pursuit of the Turtles, and encounters the Rat King, who has stolen a tanker­truck of rat poison which he plans to change into a hypnotic gas.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Turtle Terminator
programme.desc: Shredder captures Irma and creates an android Irma programmed to destroy the Turtles. The zap-happy robotic Irma causes havoc in the TV newsroom.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Great Boldini
programme.desc: Mobster Don Turtelli and his cousin the magician, the Great Baldini, steal the famous Tortellini Emerald.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Missing Map
programme.desc: The Turtles are showing Zach, "the fifth Turtle," and his brother Walt their scrapbook.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Gang's All Here
programme.desc: Michelangelo falls for a Shredder trick and eats a chocolate chip cookie made with anti-mutagen capable of turning him into a human being.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Grybyx
programme.desc: The Neutrinos - Dask, Kala and Zak - are back on Earth in search of Kala's pet Grybyx, a small and cuddly creature that, "mega bizzarro," can turn into a humongous monster.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Mister Ogg Goes to Town
programme.desc: When Krang realizes the Technodrome is running low on liquid nitrogen, its main source of fuel, he discovers that a formula exists in Dimension Z which transmutes crude oil, easily available on Earth, into liquid nitrogen.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredderville
programme.desc: Because of all the destruction Shredder causes just trying to get rid of the Turtles, they lament that the world would be a better place had they never existed.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Bye - Bye Fly!
programme.desc: Plotting revenge, Baxter, who has been turned into a fly-like creature, delivers a borellium crystal to Krang and Shredder whose Technodrome is low in power.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Ripoff
programme.desc: The Technodrome is perilously close to running out of power as it teeters on the edge of a crumbling lava cliff deep within the bowels of the Earth.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies march up and down a hill and then they watch some children explore the colour pink. Tinky Winky doesn’t know how to make Tubby Custard. He makes a mess and Noo-Noo tidies up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play a sitting and standing game. They watch some children who are sitting and standing too. Po is riding on her scooter. She hasn’t gone very far when she finds Dipsy’s hat.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are very happy and have fun jumping all over Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies watch some children jumping. Tinky Winky makes up a dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises to tell the Teletubbies ‘Christmas is a Coming’. They hurry up the slide to see some children decorate a Christmas Tree. The Teletubbies get excited when their own Christmas Tree appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Andy Brown and some children visit some cygnets. In Teletubbyland, it's time for the Tubbies to go to bed, but Po is not tired, so she rides her scooter.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are having their Tubby Toast when a voice trumpet brings them a message. The Teletubbies watch Alex Pascall and some children go looking for birds in the park.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Simone and Cacha help make colourful costumes and then dance in a Carnival. Laa-Laa loves to play with her ball, it bounces everywhere. A magic house appears before it's time for Tubby Bye-Bye.

programme.title: Mega Machines: The Movie
programme.desc: Scoop, Muck and Lofty can’t wait to help Bob with his biggest build ever – building a dam and transforming an old quarry into a reservoir to provide Spring City with fresh water.

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Race to the Finish
programme.desc: Mayor Bentley announces that Sunflower Valley is to stage its very first athletics tournament. A team from Sunflower Valley is to compete against a team of visiting athletes. Plus there is to be a special machine event!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scrambler is desperate to help Bob build a drying barn for Farmer Pickles sunflower farm. Scruffty is also excited about the building job and runs and jumps about getting in everyone’s way.

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.desc: A Pennsylvania factory-town is terrified when Dr. John Yelenic, a much-loved, local dentist is found murdered in his home.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Femme Fatality
programme.desc: A recent Harvard grad, 23-year-old Laura Houghteling, has just moved home to begin a promising new career as a Washington, D.C. lawyer.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Suddenly Psychic
programme.desc: When a 31-year-old nurse and single mother, Melanie Uribe, is carjacked in an L.A. suburb, police find her burned out truck the same night, but no trace of the victim.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Halloween Homicide
programme.desc: It’s Halloween night 2004, and two popular young women are brutally stabbed to death in their Napa Valley home.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Taken By Storm
programme.desc: In the icy waters of the Atlantic off the coast of Maine, a lobster boat fails to return from a day of setting traps. With no Mayday, no word from the crew, the Coast Guard knows it has to act fact.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Jason Williams
programme.desc: Jason Williams goes out to meet friends for a night of drinking. He never returns. His family is frantic, it’s uncharacteristic of him to be out of touch.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Murder Too Close to Home
programme.desc: When a swimming instructor, Mae Wentz, is brutally stabbed to death in her Boynton Beach home, Florida police comb the bloody crime scene for clues.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Seeking Siegfried
programme.desc: Katikati man Siegfried Newman disappeared on February 25, 2008, after he had dropped his sons Thomas, 9, and Oliver, 7, at Pahoia School. Police carried out a three-day search but found no sign of him.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: A Bump in the Night
programme.desc: In 1980, six-year-old Alicia O'Reilly was raped and murdered in her bed, while her sister slept less than a metre away, and her mother sleeping across the hallway.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Psychics Revealed - Special
programme.desc: Behind the scenes with the psychics on the show.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of Aces
programme.desc: Garth Doull trained to be a policeman but the lure of the race track saw him swap sides of the law to become a consummate con-man. On the 8th of September 1989, his body was found floating in Wellington harbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Taken Out
programme.desc: Was Donovan Reidy deliberately run down and left to die? In 1995, 23-year-old Donovan Reidy was at a party when he got into a fight. A short while later, his bloodied body was found on the side of a major New Zealand highway.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Well of Horror
programme.desc: TAPS is joined by Jason's daughter, Haily, on two cases; The Shanley Hotel in Napanoch, New York and Old Fort Niagara, in Youngstown, New York. Both cases involve a gruesome death that took place at a well, instigating paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Roasts and Ghosts
programme.desc: The TAPS team is the first paranormal team to ever investigate the famed Friar's Club in New York City. Next, the team travels to the Main Street Armory in Rochester, New York.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Stage Fright
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, the team heads to Rapids Theater in Niagara Falls, New York where a lonely actress hanged herself backstage. The staff believes her spirit has never left and is haunting the theater.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Murdered Matron
programme.desc: Special guest investigator Meredith Vieira joins the TAPS team, as they investigate Sailors' Snug Harbor in Staten Island, New York. Once a retirement home to weathered seaman, it's now home to the spirit of a murdered matron.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Bloodiest 47 Acres
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to Jefferson City, Missouri, to investigate the notorious Missouri State Penitentiary. A prison that was once named one of the most violent prisons in America.Riots, stabbings and executions left thousands dead over the years.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Voices of Pain
programme.desc: On this episode TAPS heads back to the fan favorite; Waverly Hills Sanatorium in Louisville, Kentucky, an abandoned tuberculosis hospital haunted by its former patients and staff.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Invitation to Evil
programme.desc: Paula and her husband Mike are under siege by a purported shadow demon in their North Carolina home. Paula has witnessed a toddler bed levitating and heard deep growls. Michelle, Ryan and the team uncover the shocking truth behind the haunting.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghosts of the Forgotten
programme.desc: The PRS investigation into the haunted Lake County Poor House becomes a journey through one PRS team members? troubled past.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil's Hostage
programme.desc: When a woman has long scratch marks mysteriously appear on her back, PRS is called in to see if they are truly facing the devil. But her credibility is called into question, a struggle of another kind emerges for Ryan and the rest of the team.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Permission To Do Harm
programme.desc: When a mirror levitates and shatters on its own, P.R.S. heeds the call to investigate a spirit that has been unleashed on an unsuspecting family. Ryan must track down the spirit and contain it before it does irreparable damage.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghost On the Tracks
programme.desc: PRS is called to a New Jersey beauty salon, but they soon learn that the building's proximity to deadly train tracks might be the true cause of spirit activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Who Is the Lurking Man?
programme.desc: PRS travels to Newcastle, CA to investigate a house with paranormal forces so strong, the family has cleared out. Ryan believes the Native American land may hold the key to the mystery and leads the team in a fight to reclaim a scared family's house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Asylum
programme.desc: PRS explores a New York State Prison that was once a mental asylum. Ryan and his team go behind bars to uncover the institution's paranormal past and present.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Church of the Damned
programme.desc: Jason and his family can no longer do renovations of an abandoned Kansas church, especially after they found their father in the basement crying and frightened because of the menacing activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Man
programme.desc: A grieving mother suspects her deceased son may have fallen victim to a mysterious entity called The Dark Man.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Pet Cemetery
programme.desc: Ryan and his team investigate the bizarre haunting of a woman and her dog in Waterboro, Maine. The Labrador was chewing at her own fur and standing on guard on the bed, growling at unseen figures.

programme.title: Most Haunted: SECRET LOCATION PT2
programme.desc: Most Haunted's deadliest investigation, Part 2. Spirits emerging, team's resolve tested as darkness envelops. Growing fear, team's safety at stake. Can they continue?

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Yvette and the Most Haunted team are invited to the inner sanctum of the Freemasons to investigate the many ghost sightings at Clifton Hall. Even before the investigation starts the team are faced with some of strange phenomena witnessed by others.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Part two of their investigation into Clifton Hall sees the team splitting with going it alone. For one of the team the night becomes terrifying as they find themselves locked in a room with an unseen force.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Yvette and her team take on their largest investigation to date. They have been invited to investigate a large estate where it seems just about every building has a ghostly tale.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: E-Mail, Cup of Joe, Secret of the Family Tomb, Wheezer, The Unknown Patient.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 1
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Apparition, The Electric Chair, On the Road, Number One with a Bullet, Dream House.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 2
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Writer's Agent, Crypt Ghost, The Doll, Hubert's Curse, Shared Vision.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Creepy Comics, Louie the Dip, The Wailing, The Landlady, Curse.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 2
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: One for the Road, The Music Box, Two to One, Damsel, The Horn.

programme.title: A Haunting: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Strange sounds and eerie sensations lead Charles Gonzales to suspect that a spirit haunts his Florida home. Charles asks Desiree to investigate his home. There, Desiree encounters the vicious spirit who seeks to keep Charles in its clutches forever.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon's Revenge
programme.desc: Tiffany McKinnon, her boyfriend and his 7-year-old daughter move into a 200-year-old farmhouse Franklin, VA. Tiffany discovers that the spirit of a freed slave is haunting the home and is determined to make peace with him.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Awakening
programme.desc: Marcy’s son is deployed with the Army. Overcome with worry, a dormant spirits threatens her.

programme.title: A Haunting: Mind Control
programme.desc: When William falls ill, Amanda Morrison's family volunteer to clean his home. But after the family stumbles across satanic objects in the home, strange things start happening. A demonologist cleanses the home and discovers the reason behind the haunting.

programme.title: A Haunting: Angels And Demons
programme.desc: Maryland single Mom Kathie Sheats hopes life will change for the better when she marries her boyfriend Brian. But "something" inside her house has other ideas. Spiritual warfare literally breaks out...taking over Kathie's mind, body and soul.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Old-school salesmen Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) try to reboot their careers by joining Google’s fiercely competitive internship program — with hilarious results!

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: A man discovers that he possesses the ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world.

programme.title: Made In America
programme.desc: When Zora Mathews goes searching for her biological, anonymous sperm donor father, she and her Afro-centric mother Sarah are dumbfounded to discover Hal Jackson, an obnoxious used car salesman on late-night TV; and worse than that, he's white.

programme.title: Love Potion #9
programme.desc: Paul, a geek biochemist with no luck at all with women, is persuaded by his friends to visit a gypsy. She gives him "Love Potion #9", an elixir which can potentially force anyone of the opposite sex to instantly fall in love with him.

programme.title: Black Knight
programme.desc: When a wisecracking black hustler from South Central L.A. finds himself transported back to medieval England, he leads the overthrow of an evil king and wins the heart of a proto feminist woman.

programme.title: Confessions from the David Galaxy Affair
programme.desc: Twin British sex-bombs Mary Millington and Rosemary England take on an astrologer who can bed women as easily as he can read fortunes! No-one goes home a Virgo - and Diana Dors adds to the glam!

programme.title: The Plague Dogs
programme.desc: A stunning animated adaptation of Richard Adams' novel, The Plague Dogs follows a pair of dogs, Snitter and Rowf, who escape from a research laboratory and try to survive in the wild with the help of a cunning fox.

programme.title: The Hero
programme.desc: Richard Harris stars in – and co-directs – this powerful story of an aging soccer player whose life is crumbling. All he has left is a devoted 12-year old fan – and a desire to live free.

programme.title: The Plague Dogs
programme.desc: A stunning animated adaptation of Richard Adams' novel, The Plague Dogs follows a pair of dogs, Snitter and Rowf, who escape from a research laboratory and try to survive in the wild with the help of a cunning fox.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: A Murderer's Return
programme.desc: Convict Dobie Jenner arrives in Tombstone after being released from Yuma prison for murder. When his old mining partner George McKean sees him in town, he tells Earp to run Jenner out of town

programme.title: Death Valley Days: The Man on the Road
programme.desc: A drifter befriends a boy whose father has been jailed for horse theft.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: The Man Everyone Hated
programme.desc: A general becomes widely unpopular when he plans to resettle Natives onto a reservation.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: The General Who Disappeared
programme.desc: Montana's corrupt governor tries to reform his image.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: The Million Dollar Pants
programme.desc: The saga regarding the need for and development of blue jeans by Levi Strauss during the California Gold Rush.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Pirates of San Francisco
programme.desc: A sailor, a barmaid and a newspaperman join forces to clean up a lawless city.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: A Woman's Rights
programme.desc: America's first female judge loses her life savings and her husband in a fight against corruption.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Eagle in the Rocks
programme.desc: Townspeople plan a vendetta when a Mexican outlaw is accused of killing four miners.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Cap'n Pegleg
programme.desc: A vengeful sea captain goes after the sailors he holds responsible for the loss of his leg.

programme.title: The Outsider
programme.desc: Craig Fairbrass stars as Lex, who has been told that his daughter has died in LA. However, he finds that the body isn't his daughter, and that an internet fraudster has her hostage. Lex wreaks havoc through the streets of LA trying to find her.

programme.title: Union Bound
programme.desc: Union Bound is a thrilling Civil War film that shows the strength and courage of the human spirit. Sergeant Joseph Hoover went to war to preserve the Union but finds himself captured and sent to a prisoner of war camp.

programme.title: Smokey Bites The Dust
programme.desc: This movie follows the rivalry between a small-town southern sheriff and a small-town teenaged thief who steals cars and destroys them with the sheriff's daughter by his side.

programme.title: Ice Part I
programme.desc: The destructive effects of global warming cause unimaginable devastation and panic worldwide in this post-apocalyptic disaster film starring A-list cast- Richard Roxburgh (Hacksaw Ridge) and Sam Neil (Jurassic Park).

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Nell MacDermott loses her husband in a fiery boating accident and visits a psychic to connect with him again. But when she's informed that he was murdered, Nell is compelled to find the killer searching for an elusive witness who could solve the mystery.

programme.title: Looking for Mr. Wonderful
programme.desc: After the unsolved fatal hit-and-run of a woman's father, a devious plan for revenge reveals the shocking truth behind his death.

programme.title: Secret Liaison
programme.desc: One time top public defender returns to LA to try to stop her sister from going to jail for first degree murder, but Samantha also comes face to face with the past she ran away from.

programme.title: Fantastic Planet
programme.desc: On a faraway planet where blue giants rule, oppressed humanoids rebel against their machine-like leaders.

programme.title: Merlin: The Return
programme.desc: The evil sorcerer Mordred and his dark forces are pitted against the mythical sorcery of Merlin. Under Merlin's spell, Mordred and his mother have been imprisoned for 1500 years, but a meddlesome scientist from the present creates a gateway to escape.

programme.title: Merlin and the War of the Dragons
programme.desc: An army of dragons invade the crippled English countryside and the apprentice wizard Merlin must confront the fire-breathing beasts.

programme.title: Joe Somebody
programme.desc: Tim Allen is Joe, a guy whose life has been steadily changing for the worse. When the office bully goes too far, Joe decides it's time to turn himself from a nobody into a somebody.

programme.title: A Horse For Alex
programme.desc: A Horse For Alex tells the moving story of Alex, a teenage bully who spends her time lashing out at classmates. When she is persuaded to attend a summer camp with her friends she expects the worst but the more time she spends with the beautiful horses...

programme.title: Space Warriors
programme.desc: Desperate to follow in the footsteps of his absent astronaut father, 13-year-old Jimmy's dreams come true when he wins one of five opportunities to compete for a scholarship to Space Camp.

programme.title: Attack of the Killer Tomatoes
programme.desc: A group of scientists band together to save the world from mutated tomatoes that KILL! (1978)

programme.title: Monster Squad: Queen Bee
programme.desc: Dracula infiltrates the Queen Bee's hive in an effort to thwart a worldwide bee invasion.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Mr. Mephisto
programme.desc: Confusion abounds when Mr. Mephisto replaces Mayor Goldwyn with a lookalike doll who spouts off radical opinions.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Tickler
programme.desc: The Tickler passes off counterfeit bills in an attempt to lure the Monster Squad into a trap.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Ringmaster
programme.desc: The Ringmaster holds children hostage as part of a larger scheme to buy out and close down all of the toy stores in America.

programme.title: Monster Squad
programme.desc: Frank and Dracula sign up for music lessons in an attempt to foil the mad musicians who robbed a telethon.

programme.title: Monster Squad: No Face
programme.desc: Mayor Goldwyn gives the deed to the city to Chief Running Nose, and then he declares all crime legal. Before long, the Monster Squad discovers No Face has been masquerading as both of them.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Astrologer
programme.desc: During a newscast, The Astrologer announces that an earthquake is about to devastate the land, and to ensure his prediction comes true, he makes plans to detonate an atomic bomb.

programme.title: Monster Squad: Ultra Witch
programme.desc: Ultra Witch dries up the world's milk supply, but she exposes herself by sending a henchman out for cookies.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Sláinte
programme.desc: A wave of brutality threatens a small New York City community when a body is found dismembered and strategically left out on four street corners.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Indelible
programme.desc: On the 10th anniversary of 9/11, Mac and the team remember specific moments from that day.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Keep It Real
programme.desc: The boyfriend of a punk rock singer is shot dead in his apartment.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and the team investigate when a young woman's body is found in a Ferrari.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Officer Involved
programme.desc: A night out for some drinks descends into a warzone.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Get Me Out Of Here
programme.desc: An initiation into a student fraternity house turns deadly.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: L.A.
programme.desc: Horatio Caine and Delko must travel to bright and sunny Los Angeles when a secret from Jesse's past may allow a killer to go free.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a fatal car accident.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Kill Clause
programme.desc: The CSIs suspect a company is killing its employees in order to profit.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A body falls from the sky and the team discover it is from a commercial space flight.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Backfire
programme.desc: The team tries to determine the cause of a house fire.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Meltdown
programme.desc: Delko returns to the fold to assist the CSIs.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Time Bomb
programme.desc: The state's attorney Delko has been working with, is killed by a car bomb.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Langston and Nick are called to investigate a murder at a fast food restaurant and have quite a task ahead of them when they discover that much of the evidence is coated in cooking oil.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: While Langston testifies in the trial of a respected Congressman, new evidence sends the CSIs back to the lab to reopen the investigation.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs are called to three different crime scenes in one night that are seemingly unrelated, but each case's forensic evidence reveals a common link.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When the CSIs are called to a murder scene at a familiar motel, Nick is thrown for a loop as he pieces together three separate murder investigations that all took place at the same establishment over the course of a year.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Langston and Riley are taken hostage during the aftermath of a shootout in an usually calm Las Vegas community.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Langston is shocked when his former student is found murdered and becomes the focus of a CSI investigation into the world of Mexican wrestling.

programme.title: Scorpion: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: Walter finally learns Cabe's long-kept secret regarding the Baghdad mission, and it threatens to tear Team Scorpion apart forever.

programme.title: Scorpion: Postcards From the Edge
programme.desc: Scorpion, torn apart and uncertain about their future as a team, must come together for their most important mission yet to save Walter's life as his car teeters on the side of a cliff.

programme.title: Scorpion: Satellite Of Love
programme.desc: The new Director of Homeland Security reunites the team when a nuclear powered Russian satellite is knocked out of orbit and must be diverted before it detonates over Southern California.

programme.title: Scorpion: Cuba Libre
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Cuba when a woman from Cabe's past pleads for him to help catch a Serbian war criminal.

programme.title: Scorpion: Fish Filet
programme.desc: In order to save the lives of three judges, Sylvester goes undercover in federal prison but Team Scorpion must break him out when his life is threatened. Kevin Weisman guest stars.

programme.title: Scorpion: Robots
programme.desc: Walter, Cabe, and Happy are trapped with the crew in a top-secret submarine when an explosion sends it to the bottom of the ocean with limited oxygen.

programme.title: State Property
programme.desc: A Philadelphia gang member (Beanie Sigel) becomes a drug kingpin and starts a feud with vicious rivals.

programme.title: Eve's Bayou
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes a prosperous Louisiana family in 1962 after a girl (Jurnee Smollett) catches her father (Samuel L. Jackson) with another woman.

programme.title: Monster's Ball
programme.desc: A racist prison guard has an affair with a Black woman after her husband, who was sentenced to capital punishment, dies.

programme.title: Three Hats for Lisa
programme.desc: Set in London in the 1960s, following a group of girls who skip work for the day to try and meet a stylish Italian movie star at Heathrow airport.

programme.title: The Baby and the Battleship
programme.desc: While anchored off the Italian shore, two British sailors are forced to smuggle a baby aboard their ship.

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: Family drama set in the 1930s about an inexperienced young veterinarian who joins a Yorkshire practice run by an eccentric vet.

programme.title: Medium: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Allison's friendship with a pig could lead to the whereabouts of a missing animal rights activist. Meanwhile, Joe gets a special birthday gift from Marie.

programme.title: Medium: It's A Wonderful Death
programme.desc: In the sixth season finale, Allison's brain tumor returns, which may prove to have major consequences for not only her, but her loved ones as well.

programme.title: Medium: Bring Your Daughter To Work Day
programme.desc: When Allison and Bridgette have the same dream, they end up swapping personalities, causing chaos for both of them.

programme.title: Medium: The Match Game
programme.desc: Allison begins to see floating symbols above people's heads, signs that she thinks could match people up with their mates.

programme.title: Medium: Means And Ends
programme.desc: Scanlon's haunting dreams of his late brother leave Allison concerned for her partner.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One confronts a man desperate to keep the promise he made to his deaf nephew by protecting the only place the boy has ever felt safe.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The team is called in when a car bomb explodes at a kid's birthday party. As it turns out the victim of the explosion was the head of a local biker community which is already under investigation.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The team tries to help a young man with amazing memory who is taken hostage to help get to a weapon with smart bullets which can shoot a target even behind cover.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Jules and Sam receive some personal news, but don't know whether to share it with the team.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Ed and Greg's sons come for a ride along and disobey a direct order from Sergeant Parker when he tells them to remain in the truck while Team One deals with an incident between three cops on an off-the-books mission to clean up the streets.

programme.title: Tracker
programme.desc: In this tense action-thriller starring Ray Winstone and Temuera Morrison, Arjan, an ex-soldier, is hired to hunt down a fugitive. But what starts out as easy bounty soon turns into a dangerous game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Old Boys
programme.desc: An awkward but imaginative pupil helps the handsome but spectacularly dim school-hero pursue the fiery daughter of a visiting French teacher.

programme.title: Left Behind
programme.desc: A small group of survivors are left behind after millions of people suddenly vanish and the world is plunged into chaos and destruction.

programme.title: 16 Blocks
programme.desc: From director of action blockbuster Lethal Weapon, Richard Donner. Personal demons put cop Jack (Bruce Willis - Die Hard) at rock bottom but he wasn’t about to let a witness be murdered on his watch.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Nature
programme.desc: On a family picnic, brothers Rick and Teddy spend their time keeping three year-old sister Becky out of trouble, and waging war on a hill of ants with squirt guns and magnifying glasses.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Wendell has had his share of bullying from pranksters Chet and Louie.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: The Brothers Gruff
programme.desc: When neighbourhood Ghost, Goblin and Troll Expert "Sheldon" tells his best buddy Eddie that there's a Troll under the bridge and it's following him home.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Uncle Harry's Horrible House of Horrors
programme.desc: Uncle Harry is a miserable old grump who wouldn't know how to have a good time if it ran up and bit him.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Hunted
programme.desc: A greedy Hunter sets his sights in the deepest foliage of the Amazon Jungle recklessly trapping as many animals as he can, prepared to sell them to the highest bidders.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Chuck (and Melvin) and the Beanstalker
programme.desc: Questing through the dark, thick "dangerous" forest on a dire search for food, our starving brothers Chuck and Melvin come across an eerie Trading Post where they trade off Chuck's beloved horse Splendour for a bag of magic beans.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Transylvania Express
programme.desc: When surfer dudes Ben and Mike mistakenly travel to Austria instead of Australia, they find themselves aboard the midnight run of the Translyvania Express railway.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Cold Blood Warm Hearts / The Spider and the Files
programme.desc: Kristin drives out to a small fishing community to investigate a local sighting of a sea monster. / Sixteen year old Simon's fascination with spiders becomes a nightmare when his turn of the century town is infested with arachnids of every variety.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Sharon Sharalike
programme.desc: Selfish eight year old Shauna doesn't like to share, especially with her five year old sister Katie.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Too Cool for School
programme.desc: Junior High School friends Stephanie and Jan hate rules.

programme.title: Corner Gas

programme.title: Corner Gas

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Lacey's birthday party is ruined by her deepest fear. Brent and Hank try to find Wanda's fear.

programme.title: Corner Gas

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent buys a big screen TV and becomes an object of pity. Lacey buys jewelry from Wanda.

programme.title: Corner Gas

programme.title: Corner Gas

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Fly Away Home

programme.title: Sister, Sister: The Meeting

programme.desc: Toni decides to make something of her life by opening her own exclusive real estate agency after she sells a four-point-two million-dollar property.

programme.desc: Joan dumps Chris when she learns her ex-boyfriend, Sean, is moving back to town; but is crushed when Sean lies about being engaged just to avoid being in a relationship with her again.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Getting Our Act Together

programme.title: Girlfriends: Handling Baggage

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: When an old friend of Michael is seriously injured in a hit-and-run accident, he sets out to find the person responsible.

programme.title: Knight Rider

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael and K.I.T.T. meet their match in a seemingly indestructible adversary -- K.A.R.R. -- K.I.T.T.'s alter ego.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael and K.I.T.T. go western when they descend upon Sage City to help Rebecca Hammond stop the cattle rustling on her ranch.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael is framed and must vindicate himself while stopping a madman's sale of a biological warfare agent.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael (David Hasselhoff) tries to catch up with an evil group that is planning to sell poisonous substances to terrorists.

programme.title: Skins: Jal

programme.title: Mr. D: Bully Awareness Week
programme.desc: Gerry commits himself to making a video presentation for Bully Awareness Week and finds himself with little time to deliver, while Robert is torn over how he will proceed with a new relationship.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Dance
programme.desc: Gerry organizes a dance fundraiser to cover some costs for the girls basketball team, while Robert reveals to Lisa that he had a dream about Trudy which has made him uncomfortable around her.

programme.title: Mr. D: Job Opportunity

programme.title: Mr. D: Guest Speaker
programme.desc: Gerry needs to find a guest speaker for Career Day. Dwyer supposedly has a good one, and Gerry wants to outdo him. Robert has a fraternity reunion this weekend, and he wants to avoid catching the sickness that’s going around at all costs.

programme.title: Mr. D: Quiz Cup
programme.desc: As Lisa takes over the school’s Quiz Cup academic team and attempts to get them successfully through their upcoming tournament, Bobbi is uncomfortably trying to guide her grade 5’s through their health unit.

programme.title: Mr. D: Field Trip
programme.desc: Gerry has to help Bobbi supervise her Grade 5/6 field trip to the museum, while Jeff and Robert cover his classes back at Xavier.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry's Evaluation

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Subterfuge

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Scorched Earth
programme.desc: Bombings begin at embassies and Liam believes they may reignite the SI (Sino-Indian) War, which ended with an armistice several years before. An old intelligence agency friend of Renee's has interesting holographic technology.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Liam Kincaid races against the clock to find Zo'or, who disappears after contracting an ancient Taelon virus that has the potential to cause a devastating plague.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Through Your Eyes
programme.desc: Zo'or kidnaps a comatose policeman in order to use the man's body as a 'vessel' in a consciousness transfer experiment that will allow him to 'test' the human survival instinct and cause havoc on Earth.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Time Bomb
programme.desc: While examining Ma'el's ship, Liam and Renee find a chamber and in it are some life pods and the persons are all dead except for one.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Fields
programme.desc: Liam investigates a mission run by the Church of the Companions when a friend of his disappears. Sandoval and the Taelons are concerned about "the fields" where something vital to the Taelons' survival is harvested.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Source
programme.desc: With all of Lost World thirsting for water, the explorers are attacked by raptors. They are aided by a young woman, Ana, and Marguerite becomes interested in her knowledge of the Fountain of Youth.

programme.title: The Lost World: Trophies
programme.desc: A hunting party arrives on the plateau and takes fire at a Troglodyte child. Though they claim to be there to bring them home, Veronica becomes the target of their gunfire and snares.

programme.title: The Lost World: Voodoo Queen
programme.desc: An alluring stranger named Danielle seeks aide from Roxton and the others after her village is taken by Trogs. But when the woman uses a voodoo doll to bewitch Roxton, the group must rescue her.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Guardian
programme.desc: Challenger is trapped and taken to a village of orphans, protected by dense jungle and a plant that feeds on fresh meat. Marguerite and Veronica must help Challenger escape before they are killed.

programme.title: The Lost World: Under Pressure
programme.desc: A handsome stranger stumbles onto the plateau and becomes close with the explorers. While he gains the attention of Marguerite and Veronica, Challenger's electrostatic accumulator is targeted.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Outlaw
programme.desc: Roxton and Marguerite discover a way through the mountain and explore the fissure in hopes of finding a way off the plateau. Instead, they discover an English town and trouble with the locals.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E9 - A Prefect Murder
programme.desc: While Moya and her crew are resupplying on a generally xenophobic planet, Aeryn kills the next prefect while under a strange form of suggestion.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E10 - Coup By Clam
programme.desc: The crew consume food, sharing amongst themselves. Although if not ingested by the same person, it becomes toxic.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E11 - Unrealized Reality
programme.desc: Crichton falls into a wormhole and meets up with a strange man who shows Crichton the consequences of wormhole travel.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E12 - Kansas
programme.desc: After accidentally returning to Earth, Crichton discovers he is in 1985 and he has altered the timeline.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E13 - Terra Firma
programme.desc: Crichton has arrived on Earth. Even though the Moya crew relaxes on Earth and are treated as VIPs, Crichton can't seem to adjust to life on Earth.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 154
programme.desc: Does pepper spray, a flannel shirt and a stun gun cause a massive fireball? Can fireworks really launch a person over a lake?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 166
programme.desc: Can mirrors be used to make a death ray? Is it possible to make a moving SUV flip end over end by punching down on the hood, like in the film "Hellboy?"

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 37
programme.desc: Myths tested: Will diving underwater protect a person from bullets? Can a person swing 360 degrees on a swing set?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 193
programme.desc: Does a driver's choice of footwear affect driving performance? Does a full bladder pose as much of a driving hazard as being legally intoxicated? Can superglue be used to turn a room upside down?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 218
programme.desc: Can two men carrying a pane of glass survive unscathed if a car smashes through it? Can a rocket-propelled grenade explosion flip an SUV?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women never get their hands dirty: no blood touched them because they manipulate others to kill for them...but they didn't get away.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Behind their friendly smiles, deadly women hide histories of bloodshed and murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hearts of Stone
programme.desc: Deadly Women are not always the ones you expect. They are not the strangers lurking in the dark, they are a young mother, a supportive wife and a grandmother - all killers. Behind their loving masquerade lies a wake of family horror and pain.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Business
programme.desc: Many escape the poverty of India to start new lives in the United States. One turned the American dream into a nightmare. People started turning up dead in New York's Indian community-authorities struggled to link fraud and murder to a powerful man.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: When the small community of Noel, Missouri discovered their bank was robbed, they're shocked. When the bank president turned up missing, they're outraged. And when clues began to surface the facts were more terrible than anyone could have guessed.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Murdering Cowboy
programme.desc: The sun set on the Wild West long ago, but some people refused to notice. Claude Dallas was one of them. A wily trapper, Dallas typified the rugged individualism that forged this country. He went too far when he killed two game wardens in 1981.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Predator
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dead Run
programme.desc: In Pennsylvania, an inmate escaped with the help of his female accomplice. Following a trail of fraudulent credit card receipts and deaths, authorities track the pair, but always find themselves one step behind.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Hot-headed Hotties!
programme.desc: Salina is seething over her sister Jessica sleeping with her fiancé.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do I Have a Child With a Gay Man?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Wait! Don't Read The Results Yet Steve...

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: How Could You Cover for Him?

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes Prelude To Murder
