programme.desc: A tiny puppy is brought into SASH with a deadly disease that could spread quickly through the hospital. Meanwhile, Dr Chris is called out to visit a very special patient.

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Vets and volunteers rescue and rehabilitate animals in South Africa. Harriet searches for a partially blind and injured bull elephant, and Emily and Annie track down a roan antelope.

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: The Sweeney family are looking for another sweet puppy to complete their family.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: The Dowdall family has a hard time making a decision on which puppy they want while choosing between breeds like tiny greyhounds, pulis and terriers.

programme.title: OUTmusic

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The qualifying rounds continue in San Antonio where competitors as young as 15 take on seasoned veterans on the world's most challenging obstacle course; the new Kickboards obstacle makes its debut on the course which ends with the Warped Wall.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The qualifying rounds continue in San Antonio where Minions have taken over the course and brought the new obstacle Despicaballs; other new obstacles include Shattered Panes and Final Frontier in addition to the iconic Warped Wall.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The qualifying rounds conclude in San Antonio with ninjas from across the country taking on the world's most challenging obstacle course; competitors as young as 15 take on seasoned veterans in this first round of competition from the Alamodome.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The semifinals begin in Los Angeles where the competing ninjas face up to 10 challenging obstacles, including, for the first time, Kaleidoscope, Ghost Town and Spin Zone; the two fastest ninjas will face off on the Power Tower for a Safety Pass.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Keith Blakelock
programme.desc: In 1985, PC Keith Blakelock was murdered during a riot on a housing estate in London, triggered after a black woman died of heart failure during a house search. Nobody has been brought to justice for his murder, despite three investigations.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Joanne Dennehy
programme.desc: Dermot Murnaghan returns to uncover the truth behind the horrific crimes of Peterborough serial killer Joanna Dennehy.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rose West
programme.desc: With her husband Fred, Rose West brutally murdered ten girls between 1973 and 1979, making her one of the most high profile serial killers in the UK.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Steven Wright
programme.desc: A closer look at the crimes of Steve Wright, who was dubbed 'The Suffolk Strangler' after murdering five women who worked as prostitutes in Ipswich in 2006.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rolf Harris
programme.desc: Rolf Harris became famous for his artwork and music, even painting a portrait of the Queen for the jubilee. But it all came crumbling down in August 2013 when he was accused of 12 assaults on girls as young as eight years old between 1968 and 1986.

programme.title: Wildest Middle East: Arabia: Land of Illusions
programme.desc: The Arabian peninsula is an ancient land of illusion. Extreme heat seems to sap life out of every corner. Yet, tricks of the light and the art of deception make survival possible. Nothing is as it seems.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Amazon: One Jungle, Many Worlds
programme.desc: The Amazon is the largest rainforest in the world, and the richest ecosystem on earth. This film uncovers what makes the Amazon such a powerhouse of evolution; how it has come to home a third of all species on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: The Hebrides: Land of Legends
programme.desc: Just off the coast of west Scotland, the Hebrides archipelago is made up of more than 500 islands and islets. A perfect breeding ground for millions of creatures. /Japan's 7,000 islands stretch for over 2,400 km, and cover an incredible range of climates.

programme.title: Wildest Middle East: Caspian: The Hidden Cradle
programme.desc: At the the heart of one of the most ancient parts of the civilized world, the Caspian sea is the largest land locked body of water on earth. This terrain is home to some of the most unique, mysterious and prehistoric creatures on earth.

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Vietnam: Phoenix from the Ashes
programme.desc: Around 10% of the world's species live in Vietnam, with tropical jungles fit to burst with wildlife. But less than 50 years ago, things were very different. During the war, Vietnam's forests were decimated, but as it always does, life fought back.

programme.title: Hunter

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: PS 2001
programme.desc: Mearth hates his first day of school on planet Ork so much that Mork and Mindy accompany him back to Ork Prep, where Mork's ancient teacher - who looks like a child - is still sternly in charge.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Metamorphosis - The TV Show
programme.desc: Mindy, already worried about losing her job at the television station, foresees disaster when Mork and Mearth accidentally transfer minds, forcing her to take Mearth in Mork’s body to meet the new boss.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Drive, She Said
programme.desc: Terror-stricken Mork believes the examiner assigned to give him a driving test is an incarnation of the devil, and careens along the test course in a spectacular tilted wheelie, with Mindy and Mearth in the car.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Midas Mork
programme.desc: All that glitters is Mork's gold when the Orkan learns how to make the precious metal from polyester, buys Mindy a 60-room mansion where she can stable her new horse and hires tennis star Tracy Austin as son Mearth's tennis coach.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Gotta Run (Part 1)
programme.desc: Mork is overjoyed that he and Mindy can finally let it all hang out when he meets Kalnik - an alien from Neptune who apparently is also married to an earthling and the four seem to have everything in common.

programme.title: Happy Days: Not With My Sister You Don't
programme.desc: Richie's surprise over little sister Joanie's first real date turns to shock when he learns it's with Spike, a pint-sized replica of his Uncle Fonzie.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Moves Out
programme.desc: Hoping for more privacy, Richie moves out of the Cunningham home to share an apartment with his brother and soon discovers it's not the paradise he expected.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Go To My Head
programme.desc: Richie's fears get the best of him while he's reading a book on abnormal psychology and it drives him to secretly see a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Cunningham Caper
programme.desc: Richie is sick in bed with the flu and is bored with eating soup and doing crossword puzzles. But when his family leaves him alone in the house, pandemonium breaks loose when Fonzie, Potsie, Ralph, and a burglar join him.

programme.title: Legend Hunters: Hunters of Noah's Ark
programme.desc: The story of Noah‚Äôs Ark is one of the most enduring tales of the Old Testament. Thought to rest in Turkey, discovery of the Ark has been the focus of many explorers throughout the ages.

programme.title: Legend Hunters: Alien Hunters
programme.desc: Alien Hunter Alex Mistretta investigates UFO sightings hoping to see one for the first time since becoming a UFO researcher.

programme.title: Legend Hunters: Myths of the Iroquois
programme.desc: Mason Windfield and has team investigate Iroquois Legends and find an ancient burial ground and an exorcism that went horribly wrong.

programme.title: Legend Hunters: The Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Legend Hunters, led by Graham Phillips, decipher clues and search for the final resting place of the ancient Ark of the Covenant.

programme.title: Legend Hunters: Sea Monster Hunters
programme.desc: Legend Hunters search the waters of British Columbia, Canada to discover the truth behind the creatures of the deep.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Israel Museum, Jerusalem
programme.desc: From a scientist who recreates the crucifixion to an ancient amulet that proves Star Trek's Spock is Jewish, discover the secrets inside the Israel Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Uffizi Gallery, Florence
programme.desc: From a famous artist who vanished to a traitorous Nazi who saved the day, discover the secrets inside the Uffizi Gallery.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Historical Museum, Moscow
programme.desc: From the duel that killed a genius to Lenin’s Rolls-Royce, discover the secrets inside the State Historical Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Smithsonian Institution, Washington DC
programme.desc: From the Zeros that bombed Pearl Harbor to the rocket that could take humans to Mars, discover the secrets inside the Smithsonian Institution.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Chateau of Versailles, Paris
programme.desc: From the schemes of Marie Antoinette to the spectrum of a star that reveals the origin of human life, discover the secrets inside the Chateau of Versailles.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Maritime Museum, London
programme.desc: From the musket shot that killed Admiral Nelson to an anti-piracy commando raid, discover the secrets inside the National Maritime Museum.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MANMADE
programme.desc: When it comes to disasters, mother nature has mankind beat. However, as mankind expands, evolves and technology advances, it comes with dangerous challenges. When errors are made or unforeseen circumstances occur, the results can be devastating.

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Avert an Asteroid Impact
programme.desc: Throughout history, the earth has been bombarded from space. Asteroid impacts have caused mass extinctions – including the dinosaur wipe out.

programme.title: Naked Science: Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second-largest planet in the solar system. Storms on this gas giant can cover an area bigger than the United States Clouds of the gas race around the planet at over 1000 miles per hour generating fierce electrical storms and lightning.

programme.title: Naked Science: Jupiter
programme.desc: By far the largest planet, 1300 times the size of Earth, it’s a world so enormous it could swallow every planet and moon in the solar system and still have room to spare.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Great Flood
programme.desc: Almost every culture on Earth tells the story of an ancient flood – details vary but the basic plot is the same - An angry God wipes out an unrepentant population.

programme.title: Naked Science: Atmosphere
programme.desc: We breathe it every day, it protects us from solar radiation, controls our weather – it’s the atmosphere. Naked Science takes a trip from the earth to near space to understand how the earth’s atmosphere affects all life on the planet.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: The Illusion of Time
programme.desc: Brian Greene takes us on the ultimate time traveling adventure, hurtling 50 years into the future before stepping into a wormhole to travel back to Big Bang.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: Quantum Leap
programme.desc: Join Brian Greene on a wild ride into the weird realm of quantum physics, which governs the universe on the tiniest of scales.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: What Is Space?
programme.desc: Brian Greene reveals space as a dynamic fabric that can stretch, twist, warp, and ripple under the influence of gravity, and explores dark energy, which makes up 70% of the universe.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Flight Status
programme.desc: The latest updates on the new space hardware about to launch us into the next generation of space flight some rockets and capsules are on time others not so fortunate.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Astronauts
programme.desc: One hundred kilometres above the Earth’s surface lies an invisible frontier: the edge of space.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Slingshot
programme.desc: Sending probes throughout the solar system is a mathematicians dream and an engineers nightmare, sling shotting probes around other planets to arrive at their destination.

programme.title: EARTH´S EVIL TWIN
programme.desc: Venus is a planet closest to Earth in distance and size, it once may have been as hospitable to life as Earth is now. Then something changed and Venus became shrouded in hot dense toxic clouds.

programme.title: Dream Routes: The Beauty and Mystery of the East - From Isfahan to Samarkand
programme.desc: This 3,000 kilometre journey takes us to legendary oriental metropolises.

programme.title: Dream Routes: The Grand Trunk Road - From Kolkata to Peshawar
programme.desc: This journey takes us along the precolonial Grand Trunk Road, which stretches across the entire Indian subcontinent.

programme.title: Dream Routes: The Pamir Highway - From Dushanbe to Bishek
programme.desc: The Central Asian Pamir Highway has many surprises in store for its travellers.

programme.title: Expedition Europe
programme.desc: America and Europe in 1491, and why America was discovered and not the other way around.

programme.title: Expedition Europe
programme.desc: The true legacy of Columbus is biological, and it created one world out of two.

programme.title: Expedition Wallacea
programme.desc: Young naturalist Alfred Wallace was mystified: why were the flora and fauna of Bali and Lombok so radically different?

programme.title: Wildest Places: Pacific
programme.desc: Wildest Places explores some of the most incredible natural habitats on earth & a diverse range of wildlife.

programme.title: Wildest Europe
programme.desc: From mountain to sea, and from scorching desert to Arctic tundra, Europe’s great wilderness contains a stunning and surprising explosion of life. Wildest Europe reveals the incredible beauty and diversity of wildlife in Europe’s major natural habitats.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Arctic Ocean: The Frozen Sea
programme.desc: The film follows a year in the High Arctic, where life is exceptionally entwined with the seasons. Journey to the Arctic where in winter, the sun doesn't rise for months on end, but in the summer thaws out in an explosion of life.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Iceland: Land of Fire and Ice
programme.desc: Iceland is a land born out of fire, sculpted by ice. This unique island is home to some of the planet's rarest and most spectacular creatures and it harbors some of the most extreme environments on Earth.

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: Islands can be home to the most extreme examples of life, the wildest of people and the most dramatic landscapes. Natural selection fuels evolution in the most dramatic way

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian goes on the hunt for his biggest build yet.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Moms & Dads
programme.desc: Dog pursues two people whose lives have been ruined by drugs. First, he tracks Mae, who traded a good home and loving family for an ice pipe. The next case involves Jude. His addiction has caused his pregnant wife to fear for her safety.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Do Unto Others
programme.desc: Dog is a rough, tough bounty hunter, but he's a softie at heart, as the two cases in this episode show.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A Helping Hand
programme.desc: Dog answers two very different calls for help from women. In the first case, he helps Leland protect Maria, who's being threatened by her violent husband. Then Dog visit a young woman who's dying and has asked to see Dog as one of her final wishes.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Take Your Daughter to Work Day
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa, who's just turned 18 and is studying to become a bondsman, gets to do some on-the-job training when she helps Dog hunt for Wayne, who's run out on a bond for second-degree assault.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: In Sickness and In Health
programme.desc: Dog is sick as a dog, but he still must lead the hunt for a fugitive named James. James' girlfriend tries to cover for him, but Dog surprises James in his bedroom and leads him away in cuffs.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: If the Shirt Fits...
programme.desc: Beth buys Dog a shirt with an embroidered chicken, but Dog explains he only wears shirts with pictures of either Jesus or a Harley-Davidson. When it's time to go to work, the team goes after Necia, a fugitive with felony charges pending.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Thief Who Stole Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas day, and Dog sets out to nab Raymond, who robs to support his ice habit, and give him a little Christmas gift - shiny new handcuffs.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rock-a-Bye Bounty
programme.desc: Dog and Beth must go after their former housekeeper, Lisa, who's jumped bond. They know this case will be tricky because Lisa knows everyone in the family. Luckily, Beth's nephew, Jason, is visiting and is quickly put to work as the bait.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Father-Hood
programme.desc: Before Tim heads out for a tough day of bounty hunting, he likes to get in a little quality time with his daughter, Summer Rain.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cops and Criminals
programme.desc: After giving a rousing speech to an audience of enthusiastic grade-schoolers, Dog catches up with an old friend, Sheriff Tommy Cayetano, to talk business. Dog's got a tough fugitive, named Mia, to catch and Tommy is happy to lend a hand.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cupid in Cuffs
programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bingo Star
programme.desc: Willie accompanies Kay to a local bingo tournament and gets seduced by the game, eventually embarrassing himself and Kay with his enthusiasm.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sadie's Choice
programme.desc: Willie takes Sadie on a tour of a local college in hopes of convincing her to stay nearby after her impending high school graduation.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Children of the Cornbread
programme.desc: When the Robertson brothers debate which of their wives makes the best cornbread, it escalates into a full-on cornbread cook off. Meanwhile, when Jep, Martin, and Godwin play a practical joke on Uncle Si, it ends up being Si who has the last laugh.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Whole Lotta Bull
programme.desc: The guys enjoy a one-day rodeo fantasy camp where they learn the ins and outs of riding, roping and clowning.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Here Comes the Son
programme.desc: After leaving school to pursue music, Jase feels that Reed needs some structure in his life, so he hires him to take his place at Duck Commander.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bro'd Trip
programme.desc: Jase accompanies Willie on a business trip to Arkansas to pitch a new product and has unorthodox sales strategies. Back in Monroe, Jep and Si have to track down an important item of Willie's that they accidentally shipped out.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie thinks his kids have been spending too much time on their phones and other devices so he initiates a "No-Tech Week," but when he has to participate too it ends up being harder than he thought. There's a lice outbreak at Duck Command.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The West Monroe Wing
programme.desc: Willie and Jase run against each other to become president of their neighborhood HOA. Jep, Jess and Miss Kay work on a Duck Commander themed display for the local zoo.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Automation Frustration
programme.desc: Willie buys a 3D printer for the office that starts off as a fun distraction for the guys until it appears the printer could soon replace their jobs. Si is upset that Willie invested in the 3D printer and didn't give him a raise.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Razing the Snakes
programme.desc: Jase, Jep, Si and Cole try to fight back a growing population of cottonmouth snakes on Phil's property. Meanwhile, Willie uses his business expertise to help Rebecca improve her clothing store.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Uneasy Rider
programme.desc: Willie puts Little Will on a budget for his first car but it backfires when Will decides to get a motorcycle instead. Jase and the guys are inspired to design a product using zip lines that will revolutionize duck hunting.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Hello and Farewell - Part 1
programme.desc: Jonathan helps Commander Michaels to deal with flashbacks of Vietnam; he also tries to convince her to go to therapy. Mark deals with his fear of flying.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Silent Bell
programme.desc: A pastor must follow a church council's decision to fire most of the staff at the school because they're not Christian.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Reunion
programme.desc: Mark attends his high school class reunion and learns that some memories are bittersweet for his old friends.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Source
programme.desc: A teenage girl tells school reporters that a driver came on to her right before the bus got into an accident. She may not be telling the truth. Jonathan tries to teach the news writers the correct way to report a story.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The problems of the handicapped are addressed when an amputee joins a crusade after a false fire alarm.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Discover how international governments investigate UFO sightings and the secrecy in which they shroud their findings.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Aliens and the Vatican
programme.desc: Recently-declassified FBI files cast new light on the existence of aliens, as well as question whether the Vatican could be hiding proof of extra-terrestrial life.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Weird Animal Behaviour
programme.desc: Weird Animal Behaviour: Three extraordinary stories about the supersensory power of animals, including a psychic octopus that correctly predicted multiple World Cup winners.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Premonitions
programme.desc: Premonitions: A look into the predictive power of the subconscious, including a man who warns of a plane crash before it happens following a series of vivid nightmares.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Ghosts In The Machine
programme.desc: Ghosts in the Machine: Three tales of everyday objects that are haunted by the dead, including the story of a man who is attacked in bed by an invisible force.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Aliens Walk Among Us
programme.desc: Stories that suggest aliens are among us, including an Arizona woman who claims to have been fathered by an alien in a top-secret government experiment.

programme.title: Dynasty: Viva Las Vegas
programme.desc: Nick reveals to his sister that Blake is responsible for the death of their younger brother; Sammy Jo and Steven spend the night together; Alexis shoots at Krystle's horse, causing her to be thrown to the ground and hospitalized.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Miscarriage
programme.desc: Krystle loses her baby; Steven and Sammy Jo begin dating, although Steven is in love with Claudia. Fallon continues her affair with Nick, and is jealous to find him visiting Krystle in the hospital.

programme.title: Dynasty: Mid-East Wedding
programme.desc: Fallon learns she is pregnant and tells Jeff she is having an abortion; he agrees to divorce her but only if she bears the child. Krystle remains despondent over the loss of her baby; Claudia takes a job with Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Psychiatrist
programme.desc: Alexis tricks Blake into coming to Rome and further traps him by hiring a gossip photographer to snap suggestive photos of the two; Jeff begs Fallon to cancel her abortion; as Nick confronts Krystle, his consolation gives way to passion.

programme.title: Dynasty: Sammy Jo and Steven Marry
programme.desc: Nick tells Krystle of his deep feelings for her; Steven and Sammy Jo marry; Fallon cancels her abortion; after the scandal caused by the papparazzi photos of Alexis and Blake, Krystle leaves her husband.

programme.title: Field of Valor
programme.desc: It was becoming clear in 1939 that direct U.S. involvement in World War Two was only a matter of time. Training approximately 500 to 750 pilots a year, the United States Army Air Corps was severely outmatched by the warring powers of Europe and Asia.

programme.title: Gestapo: Hitler's Secret Police
programme.desc: Hermann Goering’s Secret State Police were tasked to arrest and torture confessions and information from supposed enemies of the Reich.

programme.title: Embedded 45' - Shooting War in Germany: Embedded 45 - Shooting War in Germany 1
programme.desc: This first episode covers the last week of February to late March. When American troops started their final invasion of Nazi Germany in February 1945, U.S. Army cameramen were at their side.

programme.title: Embedded 45' - Shooting War in Germany: Embedded 45 - Shooting War in Germany 2
programme.desc: This second episode covers the last week of March to late April. The cameramen covered many stories of victory and defeat, death and liberation. Faces of despair and joy, scenes of war and peace.

programme.title: Battle for the Bulge
programme.desc: The Battle for the Bulge was the last major German offensive move on the Western Front during the Second World War.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Brendan loves McKenna, but failed attempts to connect have left him wondering if McKenna is for real. Nev teams with social media sensation Karrueche Tran to help Brendan uncover the truth. (S5, ep4)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Chanelle is the light Michael needed in his life, but out of the blue she's disappeared, leaving only Nev and Max to help him find his missing love. (S5, ep6)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: For years, Nicole has had her pictures stolen to make fake profiles, one of which has been catfishing Ryan for ten years. Ryan and Nicole are unsure whether it's a random troll, or they have a common enemy.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Artis & Jess
programme.desc: Five months ago Artis met Jess online. Artis and Jess each were in relationships, but believed they'd found true love. But is Jess everything that she says she is?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Lauren & Derek
programme.desc: Lauren met Derek online years ago. Derek is caring, supporting Lauren after she had a baby with a former boyfriend. Lauren thinks Derek could be the one, so why has he avoided meeting her?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Steven & Samm
programme.desc: Steven is due to graduate high school, instead of planning for college he wants to move to California for his online love, Samm. Steven's mum is sceptical of Samm's identity. (S4, ep10)

programme.title: The Hills: Young Hollywood / Forgive and Forget
programme.desc: At her office, Heidi gets a big bouquet of roses from Spencer. It's Heidi's 21st, and Spencer's excited to celebrate the big day with "the best thing that ever happened to him". (S3, ep13)

programme.title: The City: Boys Night Out
programme.desc: Adam lets loose while his girlfriend Allie is out of town, but when she hears he kissed another girl from Whitney and the others, Adam finds himself in hot water. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: The City: He Never Said He Had a Girlfriend
programme.desc: Allie breaks down after a run in with the girl who claims she kissed Adam, but Adam sticks to his story to win Allie back, and Whitney gets upset with Jay for taking Adam's side. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: The City: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Kelly Cutrone accuses Allie of being too skinny, and Whitney finds herself caught in the middle. Erin runs into an ex-boyfriend and old feelings begin to return. (S1, ep7)

programme.title: The City: Mingling with the Commoners
programme.desc: Olivia invites Jay's band to perform at one of her charity events but her plan backfires when the band is disrespected on-stage, leaving Whitney and Olivia at odds. (s1, ep8)

programme.title: The City: Unexpected Roommates
programme.desc: Adam kicks Jay out of his apartment so Allie can move in & Jay asks Whitney if he can live with her. Erin's plan to juggle two guys backfires & leaves her alone on New Year's Eve. (S1, ep9)

programme.title: The City: The Past Catches Up
programme.desc: When the gang goes to Miami for the weekend, Jay runs into his ex-girlfriend Danielle and Whitney wonders if the rumours about them might be true after all. (S1, ep10)

programme.title: The City: Fool Me Twice, Shame On Me
programme.desc: Whitney's crushed to learn that Jay's mysterious night out was spent with his ex-girlfriend, Danielle. Olivia steals the credit from Whitney when they style an ELLE cover shoot! (S1, ep11)

programme.title: The Hills: With This Ring... / A Night At The Opera
programme.desc: Just as Heidi's apology didn't make the cut in the last episode, Spencer's hope to elope falls flat when he shares his latest bright idea with Heidi! Whitney goes on a date with a trainer.

programme.title: The Hills: Once a Player / Finale
programme.desc: Couples have a habit of making up and breaking up on The Hills, but Lauren still finds herself in relationship limbo with Brody! (S3, ep17)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Caught In The Middle
programme.desc: Leah tells Jeremy about her confusion with Corey, Chelsea tries to get back on track with school. Things fall apart with Jenelle because she moved in quickly with Josh. (S3, ep8)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: A New Direction
programme.desc: Leah finds a larger house for her and Jeremy; Chelsea's dog goes missing; Jenelle and Josh part ways; Kailyn learns that Suzi visited Isaac behind her back. (S3, ep9)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Half Empty Half Full
programme.desc: Leah plans a 2nd birthday party for the girls, Chelsea convinces her dad to help her move, Kieffer comes crashing back into Jenelle's life, and Kailyn meets a cute new boy named Javi. (S3, ep10)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Breakdown
programme.desc: Leah and Jeremy get serious, while Chelsea breaks down on Adam's birthday. Jenelle questions if Andrew is really Jace's, while Kailyn is asked out on a date. (S3, ep11)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: A Means To An End
programme.desc: Leah has some big news for Corey, while Chelsea gets ready for beauty school. Jenelle goes through with the paternity test while Kailyn and Jo get into a huge fight over his new girlfriend. (S3, ep12)

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: The Reckoning 1945-1948
programme.desc: The Reckoning 1945-1948: In 1945, WWII was over but the violence had not ended. The survivors want to blame the Germans. The reckoning with National Socialism is ambivalent.

programme.title: Beyond The Myth: The SS Unveiled: From The "Protection Squadron" To The SS State.
programme.desc: From the Protection Squadron to the SS State: Trace the rise to power of the SS as we examine several perpetrators. Who was recruited? And why was the SS attractive to men?

programme.title: Beyond The Myth: The SS Unveiled: Heinrich Himmler
programme.desc: Heinrich Himmler: An agriculturalist by trade, he went on to lead the SS and tried to escape responsibility at the end of the war. Who was Heinrich Himmler?

programme.title: Beyond The Myth: The SS Unveiled: The Executioner: Reinhard Heydrich
programme.desc: The Executioner: Reinhard Heydrich: More than any other Nazi leader, Heydrich was an orchestrator of mass murder, and was terrifyingly clinical in approach.

programme.title: Beyond The Myth: The SS Unveiled: The Waffen-SS
programme.desc: The Waffen-SS: Masqueraded as military excellence, the reality was very different. Recruits were poorly trained and remorse was nonexistent, as SS troops killed mercilessly.

programme.title: Beyond The Myth: The SS Unveiled: The SS Death Head's Unit
programme.desc: The SS Death Head's Unit: Tasked with guarding concentration camps, this unit's actions knew no bounds, and, despite their heinous acts, still attended social gatherings.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Wicked Pissed
programme.desc: It's week nine of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season and Captain Paul Hebert, struggles to prove his worth as a captain after catching only three tuna in the first two months of fishing.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: When Push Comes to Shove
programme.desc: It's week ten of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season in Gloucester, Massachusetts, and, with only six weeks of fishing left, the competition is heating up.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Three’s a Charm
programme.desc: It's week 11 of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna season, and bad luck, bait problems and big egos plague the Gloucester fleet.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Triple Crossed
programme.desc: It's week 12 of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna season, and one captain's decision to withhold information fractures ties with an important ally.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Tuna Trifecta
programme.desc: It's week 13 of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna season and, with only three weeks left to fish, and the number one position on the line, every Gloucester captain is desperate to stack the deck with bluefin.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Caviar
programme.desc: Region 7 wardens converge upon the Intake fishing access site on the Yellowstone River as the annual paddlefish migration is in full swing. Watch anglers snag paddlefish and Wardens snag illegal anglers!

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Camper
programme.desc: The Tongue River Reservoir State Park in south-central Montana is a popular summer destination for recreationists and fishermen, and Warden Mike Krings has his hands full keeping peace among the night crowd.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Yellowstone
programme.desc: Wardens in Region 5 work their way up the Yellowstone River with a jet boat checking fly fishing outfitters while coming across a boat accident along the way. Then it's over to Region 1 for firearms training.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Antelope Dummy
programme.desc: With Pronghorn antelope populations dwindling, Wardens of Region 7 run a decoy sting the day before the season begins but the real problem arises with trespassing on the opener. Then Region 4 Warden Bryan Golie has a potential poaching call.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Cascade
programme.desc: The Upper Missouri River is a blue-ribbon trout fishery & popular rafting destination. The Cascade district in Region 4 has its share of excitement with the mysterious camper parked on private land. Then over to Region 7 for some water safety checks.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Blackfoot
programme.desc: Region 2 wardens are responding to a Tip Mont call with multiple elk down in grizzly country. Upon arrival, one elk & the suspect are missing. In the meantime, wardens in Region 7 have shots fired during a decoy sting.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Spotted Dog
programme.desc: When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Mac Pass
programme.desc: This week our Wardens receive a Tip-Mont call about a few illegally taken elk and pursue the the suspects.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Paddlefish
programme.desc: This week our Wardens are in Montana monitoring the rivers while people paddlefish and we also try and eliminate a pesky bear from one man's property.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Interstate Game Check
programme.desc: This week the Wardens set up a game checkpoint to make sure everyone is following the rules.

programme.title: Alien Agenda: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Alien Agenda Planet Earth reveals the shocking truth about UFOs and Extraterrestrials, a truth that has been suppressed and hidden for centuries.

programme.title: Aliens and Pyramids
programme.desc: Many pyramidal structures around the world exhibit strange glyphs of futuristic objects and signs of advanced machining with laser perfection. Was there help from an extraterrestrial source?

programme.title: Close Encounters: Proof of Alien Contact
programme.desc: This documentary examines whether UFOs are real. It studies over 250 amateur video clips, evaluates several recent revelations about Roswell, and examines footage of the removal of an alien implant.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Belgian UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Belgian UFO, (Pts. 1 & 2), UD: I.D. Swap, Brenda's Fire and Philip Breen & UD.

programme.title: From the Mothman to the Reptilians: A guide to alien species
programme.desc: Witnesses from around the world have had close encounters with extraterrestrial races, shaping our imagination and becoming cultural phenomena.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 15
programme.desc: Nathan banishes his bad luck back tatt. Ollie's wheezy Magaluf inking is sent into orbit.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 2
programme.desc: Respectable dad Stephen aims to see the back of a crude tattoo he had 20 years ago. Tattoo-mad ex-solider Rob's phallic self-portrait is a step too far, and Leeanneah has lyrics tattooed on her chest.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Tattoo Fixers - Xmas Special
programme.desc: The Tattoo Fixers are going all Santa by giving the nations' worst tattoo disasters the cover ups they desperately need.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 7
programme.desc: Drag queen Devon feels snared by his barbed-wire tattoo because it's a painful reminder of an ex. Alice welcomes Halloween-loving Chippy, whose portrait of her daughter is more than a little spooky.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Sketch meets Gaz, who has his best friend's initials in an intimate place, and the whole team are shocked by the cover-up he wants. Jay gives Lady Gaga superfan Harry the portrait of his dreams.

programme.title: Geordie OGs

programme.title: Geordie OGs

programme.title: Geordie OGs

programme.title: Geordie OGs

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Yorkshire

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: SW London

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Name Game/Finders Key-Pers
programme.desc: D.W. and Arthur get their feelings hurt when their efforts to insult each other get out of control. Next, Arthur, Brain, and Binky find a key--but to what? And which of them will get to keep whatever fabulous thing they find with it?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Numbers Nightmare/Brain Gets Hooked
programme.desc: When the gang discovers a list of their class rankings in Principal Haney's office, they are all taken for a surprise. Brain gets hooked on the latest tween reality show and then starts to ignore his friends and his schoolwork.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Meets Mister Rogers/Draw!
programme.desc: Mister Rogers is staying at Arthur's house! Mister Rogers is a nice guy, but... his show is for babies! Can Arthur hide the visit from his friends? Next, the trouble starts when Fern draws a not-too-flattering cartoon of Francine.

programme.title: Arthur: The Butler Did...What?/The Trouble with Trophies
programme.desc: Bailey is missing! Muffy discovers a series of clues and is left wondering, who exactly IS Bailey? Then, everyone loves getting trophies, right? It turns out that Fern could not care less about them.

programme.title: Arthur: The World of Tomorrow/Is There a Doctor in the House?
programme.desc: Since Binky's repeating third grade, he's totally dreading Mr. Ratburn's annual class sleepover at the Science Museum. Arthur and D.W. face the ultimate challenge when Mom gets a bad cold and then gives it to Dad!

programme.title: Arthur: Speak Up Francine/Waiting for Snow
programme.desc: The local creek is polluted and pesticide run-off is to blame. Francine is determined to get the word out at the annual Earth Day rally. Ladonna can't wait to experience her first blizzard, if only the weather would cooperate.

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella the Packrat/What's in a Name?
programme.desc: Prunella saves everything. Can Arthur help her break her packrat habits in time to put together the display for the school's Earth Day fair? Binky find out that his real name isn't Binky--it's Shelley?!

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur and D.W. Clean Up/The Long, Dull Winter
programme.desc: Arthur just might make it to Happy Crazy Wow Day at the park--if he and D.W. can work together to clean their rooms! Then, Arthur and the gang realize they are suffering from the January doldrums brought on by an acute lack of holidays.

programme.title: D.W. and the Beastly Birthday
programme.desc: Time to put on your party hats and dancing shoes – D.W. is turning five! When her birthday doesn’t go as planned, D.W. runs away to the magical island of Ukubonga. This is one party you don’t want to miss!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: All About Me
programme.desc: Baby Bop and BJ have fun playing ball in the park. Barney helps them learn that trying something new can also be fun. Baby Bop prepares a special picnic for BJ, but much to his surprise, it consists mostly of her favorite foods.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Splish! Splash!
programme.desc: A "too hot" afternoon becomes a "totally cool" day when Barney introduces his friends to the wonders of water.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ, Baby Bop and Riff can hardly wait for the petting zoo that is coming to the park. Riff feels terrible when he accidentally wrecks BJ’s beloved scooter.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Everybody's Got Feelings
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and BJ learn that everyone has feelings—happy, sad, angry—and sometimes all those feelings can be experienced in just one day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Play Piano With Me!
programme.desc: The children learn all about the piano when they play games, listen to real pianos and even play a little themselves.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop can't find anybody to play with her. When the others see her feeling sad, they decide to play whatever she wants to play. The dinos and kids are planning a camp-out at the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Riffs Musical Zoo - Boats
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about an upcoming trip to the zoo. When the trip is postponed, Riff decides to create a musical zoo. He gathers instruments that sound like real animals. Everyone has a wonderful time at Riff's musical zoo.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is disappointed when their trip to the zoo is postponed. Barney tells Baby Bop a tale about keeping your promise.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Break Through
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the other Autobots try to break through the energon grid and then later have to go underground

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Distribution
programme.desc: The Autobots battle, but this time in cyberspace, a virtual training program. While Alpha Q watches from the sidelines, Six Shot hacks into the program and enables the Decepticons to play in the game.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Omega Train
programme.desc: As the Autobots split up, they join with other rebels to find and free the Kickers family and Cybertron. Galvatron gets Cybertron through the space bridge.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Decepticon Army
programme.desc: Kicker searches for his family below Cybertron, while Galvatron and a damaged Optimus square off on the planet's surface. Kicker is reunited with his mother and sister.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Ironhide Team
programme.desc: Kicker's dad sabotages the energon gas grid from within enabling Optimus to get into the Command Center and Rodimus and Prowl waiting around Cybertron to get to the planet. When the Terrorcons entered the super energon, their size grew.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Formidable
programme.desc: Primus is still snoozing. When Sixshot overloads the grid, a huge explosion destroys almost all the autobots. Cybertron heads for Plains planet and destroys all the planets in its path.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Galvatron Terror
programme.desc: Sixshot convinces Mirage, Snow Cat, and Demolisher that Starscream will stay Galvatron's favorite if they do not do something about it, but when they head out Sixshot traps them and heads for the Superenergon.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Destructive Power
programme.desc: Galvatron is growing and tethered to Cybertron by strands of Superenergon. Kicker and some Omnicons cut the strands. Ironhide and Scorponok battle, and Galvatron heads into space, but not towards Alpha Q's planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Spark
programme.desc: Big Galvatron vs. Big Optimus Prime. Lots of little battles with all the others too. Kicker gets sappy with Misha before going to destroy Unicron's “puny” remains, but something's not quite right…

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Sun
programme.desc: Unicron is the “force that drives the universe” and Primus uses the super energon, the autobots band together and give their combination sparks to Optimus, Galvatron wakes/becomes Unicron again.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Darkness Rising: Part 1
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots investigate the return of the Decepticons while forced to account for a group of young humans who unwittingly become involved in their eons-old conflict.

programme.desc: A big secret's out, and Wolf can't deal. Kipo must resist the urge to pet Mega Bunny babies before escaping from sticky Mod Frog Jamack.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: It's a high-jumping, thirsty Mega Flea vs. the Mega Dogs as Kipo closes in on the burrow, but disaster may have followed her home.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies walk in sideways, then run off to watch a little boy play cricket with his dad. In Teletubbyland,Tinky Winky runs away with Laa-Laa’s ball. Laa-Laa chases after him, through the house, over the hills and behind the trees.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy & Laa-Laa hug and dance and then join the others to watch some children and Andy Brown play catching leaves in Autumn. T

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Some children go to the woods to see some bluebells. Po is walking in Teletubbyland when a bluebell appears. Po shows Laa-Laa the bluebell and then one by one more and more bluebells appear.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky is looking for the other Teletubbies. He can’t see any of them so he shouts out ‘Big Hug’ and all the Teletubbies come running for a big hug.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some girls spend the day picking and sorting vegetables in their nannies garden. Tinky Winky sets the table for Tubby Toast, but when he calls the other Tubbies, Noo-Noo tidies it all up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies run indoors and then run out again to watch Andy Brown and Georgina wash a baby elephant. Laa-Laa and Dipsy have a messy accident.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A cloud appears in Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies watch some children playing in the rain. Dipsy steps in a puddle. Three magic ships sail through Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa comes out of the house does a little dance and calls the other Teletubbies for a Big Hug. They stop to watch 2 little girls making a pretend friend, out of old clothes.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies dance a Bumps-a-daisy dance and then watch some children decorating lots of boxes to make a big caterpillar. A Jack in a Box appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies go up the slide to see two children help mend a dry stone wall. A wall appears in Teletubbyland. Laa-Laa, Po and Tinky Winky play a game with the wall. They hear Dipsy coming and hide behind the wall.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The Team are converting Mr Sabatini’s windmill into a café. Roley is rolling the ground flat for all the tables and chairs while Bob makes the awnings. Roley hits trouble when molehills keep appearing where he’s just been rolling.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are building Sunflower Valley’s first geodesic dome. As Wendy has organised the dome and knows how it all fits together, Bob suggests that she might like to take charge of the job. Reluctantly Wendy agrees.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is erecting a tent to accommodate some newcomers to the valley. Mr Bentley is organising everything, but unfortunately leaves his phone with Spud who promptly declares himself ‘Mr Bentley’s Assistant’.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Travis is delighted to receive his own Talkie Talkie and can’t wait to make good use of it. Mr Beasley arrives in the valley with a load of yoghurt pots as he heard something on the radio about making them into a house.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Whilst Bob and the team build Annie Pickles new seafront house, Muck is worried that Scoop is a better digger than he is and decides to prove himself with a sandcastle competition.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Sabatini has decided to move from Bobsville to set up the Sunflower Valley bakery. Bob and the team are going to build him a new house close to the river. Muck asks if Spud can tag along as he’s been telling him exciting stories.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is rendering a wall for Mr Sabatini. The job is straightforward, but the finished result looks rather plain, so Bob offers to get some tiles from JJ’s yard to decorate it. While Bob is gone, Mr Sabatini demonstrates his soccer skills to Dizzy.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop has spent the night in Bobsville and is off back to Sunflower Valley early in the morning. Benny is desperate to go too so Scoop promises to come back and take him as soon as he can.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Train enthusiast Mr Bentley is away for the day and, in his absence, Mrs Bentley decides to surprise her husband by asking Bob to build him a brand new model railway in the shed.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s job today is to repair an eroded riverbank. There will be LOTS of mud to shift and Muck is beside himself with excitement. Before Muck can get stuck in, Bob needs him to fetch some equipment from JJ’s.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and crew are demolishing an old barn for Farmer Pickles, but as Lofty tests his demolition ball he accidentally damages one of the pillars at the entrance to Bob’s yard. Wendy offers to stay and repair this while Bob gets on with the day’s job.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: A new machine has come to the Valley – Packer the Delivery Truck. He’s to work with Farmer Pickles team. Farmer Pickles gives Packer his jobs and he sets off on his first delivery round.

programme.title: The Legend of the Golden Hammer
programme.desc: Our first sight of Fixham is in the episodic special The Legend Of The Golden Hammer. The Legend of the Golden Hammer consists of six stories in which Bob and his team tackle building jobs at six of Fixham’s key locations.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Today Bob and the team have a very exciting job to do. They are building a bridge over the river to where Mr Sabatini’s new bakery will be. Bob promises Scrambler that he can be the first machine across the bridge.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles is having problems with mice eating his barley seed so he asks Bob to build a seed store to keep it safe. Whilst Bob is working, Farmer Pickles decides to go and buy some replacement seed.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Halloween Special (2019)
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension is an exciting paranormal show that takes investigations to a whole new level.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Ghosts of the Pumping Pit
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension head to Wigan and investigate Aspull Pumping Pit. Built in 1871, the location is currently in ruins and is home to a whole host of paranormal activity. Ghostly entities make contact tonight, in an unforgettable paranormal investigation!

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Passage in Time
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Big Condo Studios in Liverpool, UK. Located in one of the most haunted cities in the world and believed to be haunted by some very playful spirits. Will they join the team on their investigation tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Knight Ghost
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate the ruins of Liverpool castle, Bolton and encounter a ghost on camera! Could this be the most compelling paranormal evidence ever?

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of 53-year-old, Cynthia Greenwood-Smith, to unravel the lies and discover the grim truth surrounding her disappearance from her Gold Coast home in 2001.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost for Words
programme.desc: Spirited teenager Jayne Furlong dreamed of becoming a child psychologist - instead, she ended up a prostitute. In 1993, 17 year old Jayne vanished from her patch on Auckland's Karangahape Road.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Lie of the Land
programme.desc: Sue Nicholson and Deb Webber investigate one of the most complex and intriguing cases ever featured - did Waikato man Jason Dark commit suicide or was he murdered, as his family believes?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Fallen Angel
programme.desc: In this episode of Sensing Murder we learn about the murder of Angela Blackmoore, a 21 year old woman with a 2 year old child. The child was not harmed and the killer has not been found.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Without Warning
programme.desc: This week’s episode of Sensing Murder promises greater co-operation between psychics and police, attempting to uncover the truth about the death of 18-year-old apprentice plumber Regan O’Donoghue, who was killed in a hit and run in 2007.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: City Hell
programme.desc: Onthis episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Providence City Hall to investigate claims that a former mayor is hauntingthe building.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Frighternity
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads out to investigate the U.S. Naval Institute in Annapolis, Maryland, where a marine's death remains a mystery...and his ghost still roams the property.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Ghost of a Marine
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads toMount Joy, Pennsylvania to help out the Great-Great Granddaughter of Alois Bube, the founder of Bube's Brewery.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Family of Spirits
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Mt. Pleasant, South Carolina to help the USS Yorktown's crew figure out if the paranormal activity they are experiencing points to their fallen heroes.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Haunted By Heroes
programme.desc: For Grant's second to last case with Ghost Hunters, TAPS revisits one of Grant's favorite locations, Mt. Washington, in New Hampshire. Last time TAPS was here, they caught one of the best EVP's ever.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Princess and the EVP
programme.desc: The final day has arrived –it's Grant's last investigation with TAPS. And where better to close out his phenomenal run but at Jason and Grant's very own haunted property, Spalding Inn, located in Whitefield, New Hampshire.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Woman in the Window
programme.desc: Ryan and his team lend paranormal assistance to a family who lives in a historic home that was once a part of the Underground Railroad. Does the answer to their haunting lie in the mysterious tunnels beneath the house?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room & Board
programme.desc: The owners of a vacation lodge in the remote town of North Hudson, NY, feel their woodsy getaway is plagued by negative spirits.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Messenger
programme.desc: Kelli and her husband Riley are frightened in their coastal Oregon home. They are plagued by a headless apparition and often hear mysterious noises that resemble cries for help from the dark corners of their house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil in Jersey
programme.desc: PRS delves deep into the pine barrens of the Garden State to separate myth from reality about the so-called "Jersey Devil." Accompanied by a cryptozoologist the team interviews eye witnesses and experts in search of the truth.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shape Shifter
programme.desc: PRS travels to Shapleigh, Maine where a woman and her daughter are reporting attacks from a winged creature with sharp teeth. Psychic Chip Coffey arrives and senses a half-human, half animal presence.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Sex Dungeon
programme.desc: Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey and Chad Calek join PRS for this unusual case of a sprawling mansion on Greyhaven Island near Detroit. Ken, the owner, hears voices and banging and it has him feeling both watched and cursed; a prisoner in his own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Do Bad Things
programme.desc: After receiving a letter requesting PRS' help, Ryan and the team head to Ohio to help a grieving family and determine if the family's house contributed to the untimely death of a daughter.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Smoke and Shadows
programme.desc: Sarah believes her Parkville, MD home has been invaded by a powerful force ever since her roommate Dennis moved in. PRS investigates claims that Dennis has been attacked by the entity, a possible poltergeist.

programme.title: Paranormal State: I Am Six
programme.desc: Laura has felt oppressed by a violent spirit ever since she heard a chilling EVP in the fall of 2007. The 26-year-old claims she's been beaten, choked, even forcibly submerged.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: With the night getting ever more active and poltergeist activity growing, something seems to target one of the team. And what activity could make Glen state ‘’that is paranormal’’.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Tired from this long investigation, the team continue where one of them realises that the idea to investigate along was a mistake, but can the others get there in time. And something has a final message for the team as they leave.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Ruthin Castle
programme.desc: Yvette & Karl investigate a jewel in the crown of Great Britain, Ruthin Castle. They take on the infamous room 222 and soon realise they are not alone.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Chillingham Castle
programme.desc: Karl & Stuart take on one of the Most Haunted rooms in this ancient castle. Whatever is there, seems desperate to make itself known.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Leeds Town Hall
programme.desc: Karl ventures alone into the underneath Leeds Town Hall into the dark prison cells that is said to be haunted by a plethora of unhappy spirits, one doesn’t seem happy that Karl is there.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hodroyd Hall
programme.desc: Karl & Stu investigate the attic of Hodroyd Hall, and soon become witness to the many strange occurances. What or who is trying to make contact?

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Champness Hall
programme.desc: Yvette, Karl & Stuart investigate the pride of Rochdale, Champness Hall. With loud footsteps and strange noises, the team seem to be followed by a persistent spirit.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Rosie has lost her peace because of the ripe, appetising acorns growing right above her little snout. To get the desired but inaccessible delicacy, she must jump above her head or simply learn how to fly.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, and the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favourite team. However, Masha gets bored while waiting for a goal so she goes outside looking for one.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The wolves are going to cook borscht under Masha's guidance. They have a cookbook, a big pot and a ravenous appetite. But they still have to get the ingredients. It seems that the newly-minted culinary specialists will get something interesting.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Bear's old circus friend Tiger comes over for a visit because there is nothing more wonderful than passionately play chess with your best friend. But Masha has her own idea of a good time.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: When Masha and Penguin enjoy a new game together, the pair go on a fun-filled adventure that sees them travel to Mars before heading out to the open sea to visit the Frog Princess.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha becomes a personal trainer to a group of bees who are eating too many sweets.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: A mysterious night visitor terribly frightens the Bear and makes a real mess in his house. Masha knows the best way to overcome fear is to play with an invisible house spirit, but first he needs to be caught.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha and the Bear argue over which colour is the most beautiful and a wall grew between them. Now the former friends set off in search of new friends, all of which turns into an exhausting competition.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: When forest orderlies are powerless, dealing with a real epidemic is not an easy task. However, Masha gets down to business, which means everything will work out with the main thing being perky laughter.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The Bear has a rival for winter fishing: a cat with the latest equipment. An unspoken competition begins between them and it is unclear if the latest miracle of technology will win out of the time-tested method.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha is again playing mother and daughter with Rosie, but this time the roles are distributed differently. Now it's Masha's turn to put on her cap and get in the stroller. Rosie tries to endure mother's everyday life.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha finds someone's umbrella in the forest and decides that she needs to return it urgently. After a fun search, the owner of the umbrella is found, but for some reason, they are still dissatisfied.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Christmas is a time of miracles and gifts and all the inhabitants of the forest have prepared performances for Santa Claus, but Masha was the best prepared, but the good wizard may not have enough gifts for her.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The ever-hungry Wolves managed to unhook a huge tank for transporting live fish from the train. But there is a strange passenger among the fish.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Bear's closet is full of strange and wildly interesting things. Masha and Panda find a very interesting thing there, which becomes a real puzzle for them.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The clouds look airy and similar to different sweets, probably very tasty. Masha and the Bear decide to take to the skies and try the airy dessert.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Rosie has a herbarium and Bear has a collection of rare stamps. Masha wants to collect something, but she just cannot figure out what exactly.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Rosie the Pig develops an incomprehensible rash after falling into a nettle bush.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The Wolves find someone's pineapple in the forest. The temptation to eat it is stronger than the desire to find the real owner, until Masha appears at their table.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The Bear and the other forest inhabitants are puzzled, huge circles appear in the field near the forest. Moreover, Masha's goat disappears.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: Masha learns to perform tricks, like, a wave of the hands, a secret spell, but instead of a cute dove, a completely different bird flies out of the magic cylinder.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The Bear is going on a romantic date with the Female Bear. The picnic promises to be perfect because all there are fragrant lilacs all around.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: An unpleasant incident in the forest leaves the Bunny homeless. The hospitable Bear decides to shelter Bunny in his home.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: The Bear, awakened in the middle of winter, cannot fall asleep. First, the wolves do not let him sleep. Then Masha and Rosie invite him to go sledging.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: On a rainy night, a cute lamb appears on the doorstep of Bear's house. It needs attention, affection, and care. Masha happily begins to take care of the new baby.

programme.title: Hello Kitty: Super Style!
programme.desc: DB has a minor accident, but afterwards he's scared of everything. Super Athlete Kitty helps him relax so he can take part in the Port-Cerise Jumping Sticks Race.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The group of friends sets out in search of the best pumpkins, some for baking a cake and others for decoration. Although they intend to stay together, Gloomy inadvertently wanders off and becomes lost.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred encounters some small creatures who have lost their homes and asks his friends to help find them a new one. Through her research in a book, Bubble discovers that the creatures' original home is made of gold thread.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends are gathering berries to bake a delicious cake when, deep in the forest, they encounter a little yodelot who has lost his way home.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Grumpkin prepares a Troll Feast, but his friends can't eat troll food as it is full of weird troll ingredients. How do they tell him without hurting his feelings?

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Maddy surprises her friends with an unusual task of looking after a little dragon they know. What appears to be a simple job of putting the dragon to sleep turns out to be far more challenging than any of them had anticipated.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Gloomy has concocted a magical potion that creates enormous soap bubbles. She and her friends succeed in getting inside one. However, Bubble loses control and finds herself unable to stop or escape.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: After the rain, Gloomy, Fred, Bubble and Maddy are keen to see the rainbow, but they notice the yellow colour is missing. They decide to investigate the origin of rainbows and discover that in Tulipop, Jellies are responsible for creating them.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends decide to spend the night with Mr Tree under the stars. Fred, however, is terribly afraid of the dark. Despite his inability to sleep, he manages to overcome his fear with the help of his friends.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred is reluctant to go outside and play due to the rain, prompting Gloomy to seek a solution. Despite his best intentions, Gloomy inadvertently creates a mixture of sun, rain and snow.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred and Bubble soar through the sky, astride two butterflies, whilst poor Gloomy is forced to remain on the ground. However, determined to join his friends, Gloomy uses his potion to enlarge a firefly to gigantic proportions.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Gloomy's magic makes butterflies enormous, leading to an unexpected ride. Fred and Bubble fly away on giant butterflies, while Gloomy must make do with a slow-moving, lumbering glowbug.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Maya the Mermaid's musical practice causes problems with her friend Octavius the Octopus. The two get into a disagreement, and Fred and Gloomy must help mend a friendship.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends hear music from the Forgotten Forest and feel glum. They discover its source and realise that they must cheer up the Weeping Willow to stop its sad music from affecting everyone.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: In the forest, a melody so sorrowful resonates, casting melancholy over all who hear it. The source is Willow, a weeping willow abandoned by his group. Gloomy, Fred, Bubble and Maddy offer to play and sing alongside him, lifting his spirits.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends clean up their houses for the Midwinter Munchkin on Midwinter's Eve. While the others get ready, Gloomy's messy house may cause the Midwinter Munchkin to skip his visit.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Tulipop and the friends decide to visit Grumpkin. Poor Grumpkin cannot come outside to play. Gloomy and his friends decide to help him spend a day in the sun and thanks to a magic potion they will solve the situation.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred is in the swamp and makes friends with a mud monster. Gloomy, Bubble and Maddy are a little scared of this little creature but soon they realise that he is funny and friendly.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred and Gloomy decide to go to an unexplored territory of Tulipop. Despite their fear of the dark, they encourage each other and discover a beautiful lagoon populated by small lava spirits.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred, Maddy, Bubble and Gloomy go on a picnic in the forest to watch the leaves of the trees change colour. But suddenly the leaves turn blue. This is because the forest elf has lost his colour crystal.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: As winter has begun, the little friends decide to go ice skating. Maddy is not doing very well, but her friends are ready to help her so they can all play together.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Tiger Moon falls into the sea, and the whole island must come together to help it find its way home.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Hämy and Jere search for treasure on a new island, but the island is not what it seems.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The adventures of a colourful group of friends on the magical island of Tulipop.
