programme.title: Happy Days: Bye Bye Blackball
programme.desc: Richie, Ralph, and Potsie endure the harassment of "hell week" to prove themselves worthy to enter their college fraternity, Phi Kappa Nu.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Almost Dies
programme.desc: What begins as a humorous escapade with a motorcycle turns into a tragic vigil for the Cunninghams and their friends.

programme.title: Happy Days: Do You Want to Dance
programme.desc: Fonzie's latest romantic interest, a ballet teacher, is secretly yearning to turn professional and dance with the greats in New York. Fonzie, however, has trouble accepting that she may forgo their relationship to pursue her dreams of fame.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Malph
programme.desc: When Ralph Malph is hypnotized to cure his fright after a tornado warning is posted, Ralph's loss of fear causes him to tempt fate by suggesting that the Fonz needs training wheels for his stupid motorcycle

programme.title: Happy Days: Smokin' Ain'T Cool
programme.desc: Joanie believes she has to smoke to fit in with the cool girls. She ignores the pleas from her family to stop, until the Fonz defines what cool really means

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Gets Framed
programme.desc: Richie and the Fonz visit a massage parlor to escape the pressures of a heated class presidency race, and Richie's opposition photographs the sheet-clad candidate with a pretty masseuse.

programme.title: Happy Days: The First Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Members of the Happy Days gang find themselves transformed into Pilgrims when Marion dreams of reviving the true spirit of Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 2)
programme.desc: In Part II, after Fonzie discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money in a hearse, the counterfeiters attempt to silence him.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Duel
programme.desc: The Fonz defends America's pride and saves Richie's hide when he matches blades with a French fencing champion, who not only insults the country, but makes nasty remarks about Joanie

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: King Solomon ruled Israel 3,000 years ago, famed for a visit from the Queen of Sheba. The quest for Solomon's gold spans millennia. Karl Mauch believed he found Ophir in southern Africa. Yet, the search for Solomon's true mines persists.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1941, Germany looted the Amber Room, an extraordinary art installation from the Soviet Union, deemed the eighth wonder of the world. Taken to Konigsberg, it vanished by war's end, sparking a decades-long hunt.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: The Honjo Masamune, Japan's greatest sword, vanished after WWII. Taken as a souvenir by a US Sergeant, it's now a legendary lost artifact sought by collectors worldwide.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1935, Otto Rahn, a German writer, was tasked by Heinrich Himmler to find the Holy Grail. Himmler, despite his Nazi beliefs, envisioned displaying it in his castle, Wewelsberg, as his Camelot.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: The Book of Thoth, a legendary text of magic and wisdom, has inspired Freemasons, Tarot readers, and occultists across centuries. Yet, archaeologists doubt its existence despite its influence on esoteric culture from ancient Egypt to modern times.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Legend has it that in the Amazon jungle lies El Dorado, a mythical city of gold. Colonel Percy Fawcett, believed in its existence and spent years searching. In 1925, he vanished with his son and a friend during an expedition revealing a civilization.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Louvre
programme.desc: From murdered kings to stolen masterpieces, discover the secrets inside the Louvre.

programme.title: The Dictator's Playbook: Manuel Noriega
programme.desc: Watch Manuel Noriega’s rise and fall, from his early military days to his dictatorship’s sudden end.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Hitmen
programme.desc: Hitmen are masters of covering their tracks. Their only concern is for loyalty and the greatest possible profit. Investigators must always take care not to become the next victim.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Ruthless Killers
programme.desc: Ruthless Killers: They kill for all manner of reasons. Their victims: men, women, and even children. What motivates them, and how can they be stopped? Investigators reach their limits hunting them down.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Hostage-Takers
programme.desc: For the police, hostage crises are the worst things that can happen. Under pressure from the public and the media, investigators must make snap decisions that mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Naked Science: Snowball Earth
programme.desc: There is a theory that scientists once dismissed as absurd - that long ago the Earth became so cold every inch of it was entombed in ice.

programme.title: Naked Science: Venus
programme.desc: Earth has an evil twin. Venus. It is shrouded in a lethal atmosphere of carbon dioxide and acid rain. The surface temperature is hot enough to melt lead and the pressure high enough to crush a nuclear submarine.

programme.title: Naked Science: Mars
programme.desc: Mars our closest neighbor now a lifeless planet – but it may once have had water and therefore life. Naked Science investigates the red planet to learn how it was formed, how it became barren, and ask whether it ever will be possible to colonize it?

programme.title: Naked Science: Inside The Mind Of Stephen Hawking
programme.desc: Stephen Hawking, though suffering from amyotrophic lateral sclerosis has developed a unique understanding of the universe.

programme.title: Naked Science: Anatomy Of Tornado
programme.desc: Tornados are one of the most destructive forces of the planets with winds at 300 miles an hour. They can destroy buildings and hurl cars hundreds of feet through the air.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Mars: Adapt Or Leave
programme.desc: As the latest successes and failures come and go Mars continues to give up her secrets.

programme.title: The New Frontier: GIANTS IN THE DARK
programme.desc: Asteroids, the debris from the early solar system hold tantalizing clues to planetary formation. The spacecraft Psyche readies to study a unique metallic asteroid.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Hyabusa
programme.desc: The Japanese Asteroid sample return mission has reached its target and is surveying the space rock ready to dip down and take a sample.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Dark Side
programme.desc: Perhaps that American politician was right. There are indeed things we know we don’t know.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Living In Space
programme.desc: How do astronauts cope with living in space? The unique environment, the lack of taste in their food and the smell of canned air all contribute to the stresses of living and working in space.

programme.title: The New Frontier: INCREASING ORBIT
programme.desc: The ISS is the workhorse of the international spacefaring community, but its days are numbered. R

programme.title: The New Frontier: THE NEXT BIG LEAPS
programme.desc: Projects in the works. SunRISE, SPHEREx, NEOS and others, their mission to expand our knowledge of Earth, the surrounding space, Dark Matter, and the earliest galaxies. N

programme.title: The New Frontier: Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Cosmic and x rays, these mysterious and highly powerful particles from deep space are being investigated to finally discover where they come from.

programme.title: MOON SHINE
programme.desc: The International drive to return to the Moon is gathering pace, this multi- nation effort is readying to return, stay and utilise the Lunar assets.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Stars Above
programme.desc: Stars are a bit like human beings. They can be warm or cold, they come in all kinds of shapes and sizes.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: Heroes and Misfits
programme.desc: After WW1, misfits and heroes combine to become the Nazis.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: Regrouping
programme.desc: Following the 1923 Beer Hall Putsch’s failure the Nazis regroup.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Fall of Röhm
programme.desc: The Nazis capitalise on the German economic crisis of 1929.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Rise of Antisemitism
programme.desc: Two of the most powerful Nazis go head to head - Josef Goebbels and Herman Göring.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Berghof Set
programme.desc: Ruthless infighting divides the Nazi leaders at Hitler’s mountain retreat.

programme.title: Wildest Indonesia
programme.desc: Indonesia’s enduring heat provides energy for it’s reptilian residents to thrive, and so much so, they outnumber it’s mammalian inhabitants.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators: Mantis: The Queen of the Waterless River
programme.desc: This is the story of a Praying mantis which was born in the dry grasslands of Southern Italy.

programme.title: Australia's Wild Places: The Coast of the Whalesharks
programme.desc: On the remote coastline of Australia’s northwest, there are great natural wonders to be found. Above the sea on this sunbaked coast, there is very little; only a sparse landscape shaped by the arid conditions. But here, the miracle reveals itself…

programme.title: Wildest Islands: The Hebrides: Land of Legends
programme.desc: Just off the coast of west Scotland, the Hebrides archipelago is made up of more than 500 islands and islets. A perfect breeding ground for millions of creatures. /Japan's 7,000 islands stretch for over 2,400 km, and cover an incredible range of climates.

programme.title: Wild Asia: The Arid Heart
programme.desc: Staying alive in Asia’s barren heartland of desert and dry grasslands is a challenge, yet many animals thrive.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian attempts to make a mold of the entire car.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian puts it all on the line to see if the custom car mold works.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian runs into issues as he attempts some last minute changes.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: In the season finale, Ian tries to bring it all together.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian and his most ambitious client break all the rules and build the ultimate boat-inspired, open-aired cruiser. (Part 1)

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian and his most ambitious client continue the ultimate open-aired cruiser build and debut it a top West Coast car show. (Part 2)

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian gets a call from a top Hollywood picture car coordinator and works his magic to get a vintage race car back in action.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Ian is commissioned to help build a wild, massive mobile floating party island for a prestigious festival in the Nevada desert (Burning Man).

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rainy Day Woman
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Ticket to Ride
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mother Knows Best
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources - the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then, Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Irons in the Fire
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rocky Mountain Roundup
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: This One's For You
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Baby Lyssa Steps Up
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Running on Empty
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Inside Out
programme.desc: Dog kickstarts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Growing Up Is Hard To Do
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Dance Dads
programme.desc: Willie, Korie, Jase and Missy take dance lessons from Sadie to prepare for Reed and Rebecca's upcoming weddings. Jase's plan to perform Reed's wedding ceremony may fall through when he waits until the last minute to renew his ordainment.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: End of an Era
programme.desc: When Si decides to retire to pursue a music career, the family organizes a party in his honor. Meanwhile, Willie, Phil, and Jase take a road trip to try to recreate an old duck call for Si's retirement gift.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Looking Back and Talking Quack
programme.desc: The Robertson family takes a look back at 130 episodes of Duck Dynasty.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Grass & The Furious
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck for the Duckmen when an old high school nemesis challenges them to a good old-fashioned race.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Driving Miss Sadie
programme.desc: With Sadie's driver's license test fast approaching, she finds herself in dire need of lessons. Willie, Jase and Si each set out to correct her glaring failures behind the wheel by teaching her how to drive... Robertson-style.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Truck Commander
programme.desc: After Willie's son, John Luke, leaves Willie's pickup in the driveway with a bone-dry gas tank, Willie and Korie decide that it's time to get the kid his own car.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Si-Yonara
programme.desc: The Duck Commander assembly room gets an unexpected shakeup when a disgruntled Si decides to quit his job.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Fowl Play
programme.desc: Willie finds his office in shambles and alerts the authorities that the warehouse has had a break in.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Inner Limits
programme.desc: A young man decides to institutionalize his brother who has been completely paralyzed and speechless for many years, against the wishes of their mother.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: It's a Dog's Life
programme.desc: Mark believes that God has turned Jonathan into a dog. Meanwhile, he must contend with a runaway kid and the kid's scatterbrained mother.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Merry Christmas from Grandpa
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Jonathan shows three men what will happen in the future if the Earth continues to be ravaged by pollution. One of the men is an energy official another is a farmer and the third one is the President.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Pilot - Part 1
programme.desc: In the series opener, we meet Jonathan Smith, a probationary angel who has been sent to help people on Earth. He befriends residents at a retirement home. The administrator at the home has a brother named Mark who is suspicious of Jonathan.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Pilot - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan helps the residents of Havencrest, when they learn that the retirement home is going to be sold. Jonathan must reveal his real identity to Mark in order to complete the assignment.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Russia's Mountain Mummy Enigma
programme.desc: Russian soldiers make a grim discovery on a mountain. An abandoned town has an unusual past. Scientists working in Antarctica find something surprising beneath the ice. In Greenland, strange depressions in the ground are investigated.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Riddle Of Whale Bone Alley
programme.desc: Merging CGI recreations, advanced scanning technology and scientific research, this series journeys to the planet’s most remote, cold and inhospitable places to reveal great mysteries that were once frozen in time.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Ancient Ice Zombies
programme.desc: Thirty World War II aircraft all crashed in the same spot on the Greenland Ice sheet, causing experts to wonder if they all fell victim to the Arctic’s Bermuda Triangle.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Inca Child Sacrifice
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, the series investigates the curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Embark on an eye-opening journey as experts investigate the startling mysteries captured by satellites orbiting the Earth: from hidden worlds to unexplainable natural phenomena.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Iago Syndrome
programme.desc: Krystle says goodbye to Nick and leaves Denver; Blake offers to adopt Jeff; Cecil blackmails Claudia; Nick accepts Blake's explanation of his brother's death.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Party
programme.desc: At a party in her honor, Sammy Jo embarrasses the Carringtons and reveals to Fallon that Blake is not her father; Jeff leaves the party with Claudia; Blake tells Krystle his eyesight is restored; Fallon is left unconscious after a car accident.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Baby
programme.desc: Fallon gives birth to a son; Alexis offers Sammy Jo $25,000 to leave Denver; Jeff and Claudia make love; Krystle accuses Alexis of killing her baby; Alexis learns Krystle and Blake are not legally married.

programme.title: Dynasty: Mother and Son
programme.desc: Upon learning he is not her true father, Fallon refuses to see Blake; Jeff falls in love with Claudia, who is caught stealing from Denver-Carrington; Fallon's baby undergoes emergency surgery; Claudia's husband and daughter are believed dead.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Gun
programme.desc: A blood test proves that Blake is Fallon's true father; Steven travels to Hollywood in search of his wife; Claudia learns her husband and daughter are believed to be dead; as Krystle struggles with an armed Claudia, the gun discharges.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Fragment
programme.desc: Claudia is hospitalized after the shooting incident; Krystle is implicated. Logan Rhinewood continues to amass Devner-Carrington; Cecil proposes marriage to Alexis.

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II
programme.desc: The second episode starts on the morning of the 22nd of June 1941 when the Germans launched operation Barbarossa, the code name for the invasion of the Soviet Union.

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II
programme.desc: The third episode opens with Rommel’s second offensive in North Africa.

programme.title: NEW: Great Tank Battles of World War II
programme.desc: The fourth episode sees the Germans well and truly on the retreat and the Allies are able to successfully implement operation Husky: the landing on Sicily.

programme.title: War Story: Bomber Command: Hitting Back
programme.desc: After surviving the German bombing campaign of British cities, RAF Bomber Command struck back against Germany. The devastating consequences of raids, for both for the young men in the skies and the people on the ground, are portrayed in this film.

programme.title: War Story: Bomber Command: Getting Home
programme.desc: In this film, Bomber Command personnel and a Luftwaffe pilot take the viewer through the frightening reality of fighting in the skies as they try to get a damaged bomber home.

programme.title: War Story: Bomb Girls Remember
programme.desc: During the Second World War, 250,000 Canadian women helped to build the arsenal of democracy. These young women met the challenges of factory work and helped to win the Second World War, and by doing so, paved the way for future generations.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Tracie & Sammie
programme.desc: Tracie Thoms had a connection with a fan named 'Sammie' after hearing about the passing of Sammie's friend. Sammie suddenly disappeared and now Tracie is left wondering who Sammie really is?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Chitara & Priscilla
programme.desc: Chitara took a big leap and came out to her family when she met Priscilla online, but Priscilla ended their relationship unexpectedly. Now Chitara is determined to find out what happened.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: For years, Nicole has had her pictures stolen to make fake profiles, one of which has been catfishing lovelorn, 27-year-old Ryan for 10 years. Is this a random internet troll or do Ryan and Nicole have a common enemy?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Stephanie & David
programme.desc: Catfish brings together couples who've interacted solely through screens. In this edition, Stephanie searches for the man she's been talking to in an unseen episode.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Rico & Ja'Mari
programme.desc: Rico wants to move to England to care for his ailing mother, but his intense online relationship with Ja'mari, an international male model, is giving him second thoughts about leaving. (S1, ep11)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Tiana & James
programme.desc: After a three-year online relationship, Tiana moved across the country to be with the love of her life, James, and reveal her secret. But now James seems more elusive than ever.

programme.title: The City: Hit It And Quit It
programme.desc: Whitney grows cautious about Freddie just as her ex, Jay, comes back into the picture. Roxy clashes with Olivia when People's Revolution and Elle join forces to put on a party. (S1, ep18)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Sleeping with the Enemy
programme.desc: The roommates deal with the aftermath of the fight. Angelina starts dating Jose, a guy from the club; Jenni and Snooki clean up the smush room in preparation for Snooki's hook-up. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: All in the Family
programme.desc: When news gets out that Angelina and Vinny hooked up, Mike threatens to spill the beans to Jose. Vinny and Pauly find the girls of their dreams, but one of them will be heartbroken. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Dirty Pad
programme.desc: Things go south for Angelina when the house learns that she slept with Jose after smushing Vinnie, but trouble really ensues when she gets too close to a guy Snooki hooked up with. (S2, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation Guidos On Ice
programme.desc: The girls get to know Ronnie's girlfriend, the couples face off in the first annual Bae Game, Vinny's reunited with a long lost love, and a Jersey Shore family fun day is about to take a turn when The Investigation returns.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation Surprise! It's a Snooki
programme.desc: Mike takes The Investigation to the next level when he goes "full disclosures," a spirited debate occurs on the toilet, And Snooki arrives in the Poconos to surprise JWOWW on her birthday.

programme.title: Teen Mom: How Many Chances?
programme.desc: Maci contemplates breaking up with her fiancé, while Farrah starts dating a new guy despite her family's disapproval. Meanwhile, Amber and Catelynn both face personal issues.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Farrah goes to Vegas for a girls' trip and her ex-boyfriend shows up. Catelynn and Tyler hurry to get everything ready for the launch of their children's clothing line. Amber kicks Matt out. (S7, ep3)

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci wants Ryan to pass a drug test before he can see Bentley. Farrah travels abroad for work and leaves Sophia in Michael's care. Catelynn and Tyler launch their kids clothing line. (S7, ep4)

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Farrah plans a family trip to Italy. Bentley starts third grade and Maci is still determined to keep him away from Ryan. Amber is depressed after breaking up with Matt. (S7, ep5)

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber is completely done with Matt and starts dating a new guy. Farrah visits Omaha and Sophia expresses her dislike for Deb's fiancé. Taylor surprises Maci and takes her skydiving. (S7, ep6)

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber makes her first public appearance with her new boyfriend. Tyler struggles with Butch's drug use. Farrah and Sophia model at New York fashion week. Ryan continues to stay clean. (S7, ep7)

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: 1942. Nazi Germany's Blitzkrieg enters Egypt. Field Marshal Erwin Rommel, aka the Desert Fox, has his eyes set on Cairo, but first he must overcome General Bernard Montgomery, the British Eighth Army, and the area's punishing fighting conditions.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: July 1943. For six months, the German advance has stalled, but Hitler is convinced that his new generation of Nazi tanks will help put the Reich back on the path to European domination. His target: the Soviet town of Kursk.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: Stunning, newly colorised combat and newsreel footage plus personal memoirs take us to the heart of a battle that would be a catastrophic blow to both sides and leave a muddy graveyard across East Belgium.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: Rare newsreel and amateur footage, newly colorised, take us inside Hitler's crumbling empire and onto the front lines of the firefight for the streets of Berlin, a battle that will determine the fate of World War II.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Ranged Weapons
programme.desc: Ranged weapons guarantee a warrior's best chance of survival. International experts survey history’s most important ranged weapons, from the Roman spear and the English longbow, right up to the futuristic railgun.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: First Blood

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Anchor Anger
programme.desc: The rivalry between captains Dave Carraro and Tyler McLaughlin intensifies, while other boats in the fleet push to bring new mates up tospeed in the North Atlantic Bluefin fishing season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bluefin Beatdown
programme.desc: An old rivalry re- ignites after a fight at the dock between captains Tyler McLaughlin and Dave Carraro, of FV- tuna.com, while a crewmember fights to keep his job on the Hot Tuna.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Harpoon Hellraising
programme.desc: It's week four of the North Atlantic Blue Fin Tuna Season and oneveteran Gloucester captain has yet to catch his first fish, while two rival harpoon boats go head to head.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Go Hard or Go Home
programme.desc: It's week five of Gloucester's Bluefin tuna fishing season, and when a sudden storm engulfs the fleet, each captain must decide if the risk of staying out on the water is worth the reward.

programme.title: Bent Rods and Broken Hearts
programme.desc: It's week six of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season and the Gloucester fleet's underdogs struggle to turn around their seasons.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Snow Cat

programme.title: NEW Mugshots: Timothy McVeigh: Made in America
programme.desc: This chilling special explores how Timothy McVeigh's act of domestic terrorism that killed 168 people.

programme.title: NEW Mugshots: George Rivas

programme.title: NEW Mugshots: Chris Paciello: The Mob Over Miami
programme.desc: Chris Paciello was helping create the star-studded culture of South Beach when he was arrested by the FBI.

programme.title: The Crime Business: The Bent Cop
programme.desc: We look at the motivations that turn a good cop rotten and meet former Liverpool Det Chief Insp Elmore Davies who accepted money for information to villains and got booted out of the force.

programme.title: The Crime Business: The Armed Robber

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Buckinghamshire
programme.desc: Just a stone's throw from London, Buckinghamshire is the ideal location for two couples trying to combine high flying careers in the City, with the peace and quiet of small-town life for their young families.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: East Midlands
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are back and busier than ever, as they attempt to find homes for two sets of house hunters with very different needs in an extremely challenging market.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: South Liverpool
programme.desc: Will Phil be the knight in shining armour to rescue these damsels in distress, and will Kirstie turn out to be Kate's property fairy godmother? Will they fail in their quest or find property success in Liverpool South?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Tyne Valley

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Hackney

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: The Takeout with Major Garrett
programme.desc: The Takeout is a new spin on the widely acclaimed podcast hosted by Major Garrett; a daily streaming show that harnesses the best of CBS News' political reporting and lives comfortably in deep discussions.

programme.title: The Daily Report
programme.desc: The Daily Report on CBS News features original interviews and insights on the most important, urgent and interesting stories of the day.

programme.title: CBS Evening News Plus
programme.desc: John Dickerson will guide viewers through the most impactful and important news of the day using in-depth conversations with CBS News journalists and contributors, as well as original reporting on national issues.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7 Primetime
programme.desc: 24/7 Primetime is your essential daily guide to all the stories shaping your world. Anchored by CBS News' Elizabeth Cook, the show delivers the news you need to know.

programme.title: Arthur: My Music Rules/That's A Baby Show!
programme.desc: It's the duel of the century as cellist Yo-Yo Ma faces jazz saxophonist Joshua Redman in the toughest gig of their careers at the Elwood City Library! Then, will Arthur be exposed as a baby show lover?

programme.title: Arthur: Brain's Brain/Brain Sees Stars
programme.desc: Brain's Easter egg hunts are notoriously hard. But this year's might prove impossible if Brain can't remember where he hid the final egg. Then, crazy coincidences have prevented Brain from seeing a meteor shower in person.

programme.title: Arthur: Lights, Camera...Opera!/All Worked Up
programme.desc: When Muffy's Dad gives her concert tickets, she couldn't be more excited--until she discovers that she's going to the opera. And Arthur aced five quizzes in a row! But his luck runs out when Mom takes a new job.

programme.title: Arthur: The Perfect Game/D.W.'s Furry Freakout
programme.desc: Francine is excited about a school project, but she's so obsessed with making it perfect that she can't seem to get anything done at all. When D.W. finds a stray kitten, it soon turns out to be a lot more than D.W. can handle.

programme.title: An Arthur Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Arthur and his family are getting ready for Thanksgiving! But when Pal disappears to go on his own adventure, family, friends and the rest of Elwood City try to get Pal home. Will they be able to celebrate the best Thanksgiving yet?

programme.title: Arthur: Vomitrocious!/Sue Ellen Chickens Out
programme.desc: It's just a regular day until Francine starts to feel queasy, and then throws up in the cafeteria! Now Francine is afraid to go back to school. And, Sue Ellen learns that a fast-food chain is taking over the beloved Sugar Bowl.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Tooth/D.W. Gets Lost
programme.desc: It's bad enough to wear glasses all the time. But does Arthur have to be the last person in his class to lose his baby teeth? Then, if you think being lost in a humongous department store would scare a four-year-old, think again.

programme.title: Arthur: Meek For A Week/Arthur, World's Greatest Gleeper
programme.desc: Muffy bets Francine she can't be nice to everyone for a whole week--and soon wishes she hadn't. Next, Arthur didn't mean to tell a lie, he just got stuck in a sort of fib, because he thought it was cool to be a Gleeper.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When some of the children in the park invite Barney to join them for a race./When BJ starts to feel sick after eating too many sweets, he lies down in hopes of feeling better.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Butterflies - Nature Of Things
programme.desc: Baby Bop is sad because she lost her pet caterpillar, Monty. Barney and the others try to help her find it. Baby Bop is surprised to discover Monty inside a chrysalis. Everyone is excited to find Monty—now a beautiful butterfly!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends are excited about a fishing contest. Barney tells Riff about a famous musician named Beethoven who wrote beautiful music even when he couldn't hear.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Friends the Doctor
programme.desc: Time for a check-up! Barney helps his friends discover the world of doctors and dentists as they learn about healthy habits like brushing teeth, getting checkups, eating healthy foods and getting exercise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Emperor's Contest - The Whole Truth
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about a fishing contest that is being held in the park; everyone except Ryan, who doesn't want to follow the contest rules. When Ryan is tempted not to follow the rules, Barney tells a story called "The Emperor's Contest."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: All Aboard
programme.desc: Kami, one of Barney's youngest friends, has trouble keeping up with the other kids and she's tired of always being last. She's not having a very good day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids take imaginary trips to different countries with the magical caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney reminds Riff and BJ that Christmas is about more than getting gifts. Barney takes Melanie on a trip to the North Pole to deliver her letter in person.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Speed Metal

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Predatory

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Sick Mind

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Out of His Head
programme.desc: Megatron remains a fixture inside Bumblebee's mind and manipulates his actions back at Autobot base.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Shadowzone
programme.desc: The kids accidentally become stuck inside an alternate dimension during a GroundBridge malfunction. To make matters worse, they're trapped with a reanimated Skyquake!

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Operation: Breakdown
programme.desc: The Autobots roll out to rescue Breakdown, the Decepticon, who has been abducted by Silas and the sinister agents of Mech.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Crisscross
programme.desc: Airachnid negotiates a deal with Silas to use Mech to exact revenge against Arcee and Jack.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Metal Attraction
programme.desc: Arcee and Bulkhead find their efforts to stop a Deception mission hampered by a magnetic device, which forces them to work more closely together than usual.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Rock Bottom
programme.desc: The Autobots, with Jack and Miko, fall victim to an Energon mine cave-in – and find themselves trapped with Starscream and Megatron!

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Partners
programme.desc: Airachnid and Starscream are forced to partner to retrieve a powerful weapon; but upon being captured by Optimus and team, Starscream shockingly reveals that he would rather partner with the Autobots!

programme.desc: The Teletubbies pass over a hill, one by one to say “Eh-oh”. They watch three boys making an obstacle course. In Teletubbyland, it’s time for the Teletubbies to go to bed.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Trains and Treehouses
programme.desc: Bob and his ‘Can-Do’ crew are back on site with a brand new adventure! Join Bob as he builds a train set for Mr Bentley as a birthday surprise and helps find a family of squirrels a new tree-house home.

programme.title: Scrambler to the Rescue
programme.desc: Its winter in Sunflower Valley and Bob and his team are building a concert hall in time for a special winter celebration. Scrambler is especially keen to help – but is frustrated that there’s nothing for an energetic quad-bike to do!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has bought a new attachment for Benny to try. It looks a bit big and heavy, but Benny is desperate to try it out so Bob promises he can as long as he’s with him to help. Bob gets an excited phone call from Sandy Beech up at the cave house.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Beasley’s pipes and boiler are making banging noises and Bob is called in to replace them. Whilst Bob and Wendy are collecting the new Boiler from JJ, Molly explains that she is looking after Mrs Broadbent’s baby rabbits.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s too busy to even tell the machines what the job is for today. He takes Scrambler to the dome and the others follow. It turns out that they are going to turn the whole of the Dome into a Visitors centre and its opening tomorrow!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Trix is looking for something to do so JJ sends her to deliver a bag of wood chippings to Bob who is building a Jungle Jim climbing frame in the school playground. Trix likes being busy and starts offering to fetch and carry everything for everyone.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Now that Robert has taken over at the old yard, Wendy can finally move to Sunflower Valley! Bob is still in Bobsville, while the machines are in charge of setting up Wendy’s caravan, complete with solar panels, as a special surprise.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has been asked to install a new air conditioning unit at Mr Sabatini’s restaurant. Wendy and Molly meanwhile have been asked to redecorate the library at the school.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Robert and Dot, Bob’s Mum and Dad are visiting the Valley. Bob shows them around, pointing out their recycling storeroom. Robert notices Bob’s old rubble chute. Bob explains that he hasn’t had much use for it out in the valley.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop and Dizzy have spent the night at Bob’s old yard in Bobsville to help Wendy with some digging and mixing. The machines all wish that Wendy could come and live out in Sunflower Valley.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a water feature in Mrs Potts’ garden, while Wendy and Scoop are demolishing a dry stone wall. Bob and the Machines are greatly amused by the statue Mrs Potts has chosen for her centrepiece.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is replacing a potting shed on Mr Beasley’s allotment. In the old shed is a chest which Mr Beasley doesn’t need any more. Meanwhile Wendy calls at JJ’s for the materials for the new shed.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a Seaweed Farm for Annie Pickles – Farmer Pickles cousin. Scrambler volunteers to help Annie collect seaweed seedling on the beach.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles has decided to open a camp site on his land, and Bob is installing a shower block and fence to keep the sheep out. For once, he is working on his own while Wendy goes on holiday with Jenny.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has been making secret early morning trips to the school where Mrs Percival has been giving him salsa lessons, as he wants to impress everybody at the town dance that night.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s the team’s first full day in Sunflower Valley and the machines are all a bit nervous of the mammoth job ahead. All except for Muck who is determined to show that he’s not a bit worried. Travis arrives with Bob’s new mobile home.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: An observation tower is going to be added next to the Visitor’s centre to provide a scenic view of Sunflower Valley. The scaffolding is raised and Roley prepares a path to connect the tower to the Dome.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts David Harper and Catherine Southon go on a buying spree through mid-Wales on the third leg of their journey from Lancashire to Devon.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Harper brushes shoulders with a TV classic and Catherine Southon gets a taste for one of Gloucester's finest edibles as they head for auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon gets to dance and David Harper finds himself financially embarrassed as they head for a final auction showdown at Seaton in Devon.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and Charles Hanson join forces in a smart classic car for a 500-mile trip from Cheshire to Winchester on the first leg of their journey.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross goes cricket mad and his rival Charles Hanson goes to the pub and unearths some skulduggery as the pair takes their road trip from Chesterfield to Grantham.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the third leg of their road trip Charles Hanson visits the solicitors and Charlie Ross finds history in an old packet of cigarettes.

programme.title: Ref Wars
programme.desc: Join referees Russ Bray and George Noble as they go head-to-head in a competitive game of darts!

programme.title: Break of Throw: Taylor on Littler
programme.desc: Phil Taylor breaks down Littler's throw, revealing the secrets behind the young World Champion's technique.

programme.title: Darts

programme.desc: This episode includes: Silent Witness, Mary Celeste, UD: Hoochie Coochie and Sunshine Guys & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Update: Molester Cop, Thanks Lieutenant Stevens and Roswell Pts. 1 & 2.

programme.desc: This episode includes: The Unexplained Death of Kurt Cobain, Bordello Murders, College Student Murders, Jesse James Hollywood, Profiling the Paranormal and Trucker Disappearance.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 18
programme.desc: This episode includes: Mexico Suicide, Campbell Kidnapping, Dr. Rapist, Update: Where's Kari, Dodge Heir and Real Monica.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 22

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunted Theme Park - Part 2
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension continue investigating Camelot Theme Park, the UK's most haunted and come face to face, with a powerful paranormal entity.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Margie Calciano
programme.desc: Detective Robert Wanner consults psychic Lauren Thibodeau to help with a case that has left him stumped. Surprisingly she instead offers clues on a cold case that’s been worrying Wanner for years.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Rachel Domas
programme.desc: Can a veteran psychic and a rookie cop crack a case of a missing fourteen-year-old girl? Rachel Domas misses her school bus and walks the 3 miles home. She’s never seen again.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Alexis Burke
programme.desc: The police receive a call from John Burke, his twenty-one year old wife Alexis has been missing for three days. She took off in the family car after a fight and hasn’t been seen since.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Penney Serra
programme.desc: Twenty-one year old Penney Serra was brutally murdered in a parking garage. The police thought it was an open and shut case – witnesses had seen a suspect flee.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Lynsey Quy
programme.desc: Lynsey Quy a young mother and wife mysteriously vanishes on Christmas day, her husband reports her missing, the police start their search.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Mick Hughes
programme.desc: Landlord and pub owner Mick Hughes is brutally attacked in his living quarters situated above his bar, he bleeds to death. Discovered by employees 48 hours later, the police start gathering evidence.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Darryl Cozart
programme.desc: Family man Darryl Cozart disappears one night after work. His wife is frantic she knows something is wrong. The police believe it’s a missing persons case.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Southern Organs
programme.desc: A dedicated psychic puts his reputation on the line to track down two con men in Scotland.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Baton Rouge
programme.desc: A serial killer is loose in Baton Rouge, police believe they’re looking for a youngish white man driving a white pick up truck.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: Jim Donnelly was a hard-working family man living a quiet life in suburban Auckland. For 20 years he’d worked as a scientist at the Glenbrook Steel Mill, south of Auckland. On the 21st of June 2004, he simply vanished into thin air.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Patient Killer
programme.desc: In 1976, thirteen-year-old schoolgirl Tracey Ann Patient was plucked off Auckland's Great North Road. The following morning, her body was found dumped 16 km away in the Waitakere Ranges, having been strangled with a pantyhose tourniquet.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of the Dark
programme.desc: Described as a brutal execution, 46-year-old grandmother Chattrice Maihi-Carroll was found naked, stabbed to death in her New Zealand home in 2008. There were multiple suspects and everything seemed resolved following the arrest of a neighbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: In 2006, 19-year-old Blake Stott died in a mysterious car fire. Blake had seemingly pulled into a South Otago lay-by to have a sleep, when his late-model, un-modified car burst into flames.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Vanishing Point
programme.desc: In 2003, 32-year-old mother of three Sara Neithe vanished from the Hauraki Plains. Neither Sara nor her car have been seen since. Police suspect that Sara has been murdered but without a crime scene, they have been unable to advance the case.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Don't Feed the Apparition
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS revisits a familiar city, Alexandria, Louisiana, but this time, they're there to investigate the Alexandria Zoo.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghostly Refuge
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Oswego, New York to investigate the renowned Fort Ontario. TAPS has investigated many forts, but never one that once served as a sanctuary for Jewish refugees during World War II.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Paranormal Politics
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads down South to help two different families find some closure. First stop is Baton Rouge, Louisiana to investigate the Old State Capital Building, which has endured theCivil War and a congressman's death.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Curtain Call
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Joliet, Illinois to investigate the Rialto Square Theater, which is becoming known for being more than just an entertainment venue.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Fear Factory
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Claremont, New Hampshire to investigate a former shoe and furniture factory, the Topstone Mill. What was once an abandoned space has now become a restaurant and bar...

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Haunted Piano
programme.desc: Ryan and the PRS team are called in when unlucky antique collectors unwittingly bring a paranormally-infested piano into their home. The team attempts to dismantle and destroy the offending instrument.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Intervention
programme.desc: Carol Ann stays awake every night taping the voices of the dead. PRS cuts their winter break short to help her curtail her obsession and close this doorway to the dead--for good.

programme.title: Paranormal State: They Only Come Out at Night
programme.desc: Once night falls in a quaint?New England Town, a police officer's family is terrorized by demons.?PRS arrives just in time with the family ready to vacate their family home, rather than suffer the advances of these spirit creatures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vegas
programme.desc: The PRS travels to Sin City to investigate a 14-year old medium who claims to speak to a dead girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Drowned
programme.desc: Kim and her family have been frightened out of their seaside Maryland home. Multiple family members have reported sightings of children with purple lips and strange noises emanating from the nearby creek.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room 37
programme.desc: Darrell and Cherry, the owners of an historic Tennessee bed and breakfast built in the late 1800s, are reporting apparitions of a man and hearing whistling throughout the hotel corridors.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Connection
programme.desc: P.R.S. is called in to help a young mother tormented by an otherworldly connection to a teenage girl murdered in her neighborhood years ago. Could she have psychic ability or is there a more sinister force at work?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Family Ties
programme.desc: Jimmie is haunted by the apparition of a mysterious old woman who peers at him in the bathroom of his family's Petersburg, VA home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Requiem
programme.desc: A young woman named Kristy has been haunted in her own bedroom since she can remember. Now it's up to Ryan and the crew to help Kristy before she's overwhelmed by the entity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vendetta
programme.desc: P.R.S. investigates claims of supernatural revenge in the Pennsylvania Poconos. When a client's new boyfriend moves in, does the paranormal move in with him? Or did her ex put a hex on her house and the entire family?

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Doncaster Air Museum Pt1
programme.desc: The famous Air Museum in Doncaster houses many an artefact of aviation history and many spirit from its past. Karl investigates one of the huts that is said to be full of paranormal happenings, and he isn’t disappointed.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Doncaster Air Museum Pt2
programme.desc: The main hanger of Doncaster Air Museum is a vast building and houses flying aircraft of every kind. Stuart ventures alone and soon realises something is there with him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Nunnington Hall Pt1
programme.desc: Karl investigates the upper floors of this large manor house that is said to be swarming with paranormal activity of every kind, and gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Nunnington Hall Pt2
programme.desc: The creaky corridors and old rooms of Nunnington Hall have many stories of ghosts and phantoms, Stuart investigates the middle floors and starts to experience unexplained happenings.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Shrewsbury Prison Pt1
programme.desc: Yvette & Mary enter the vast expanse of the very haunted A-Wing on their own and soon start to regret their decision.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Shrewsbury Prison Pt2
programme.desc: With Yvette and Mary investigating A-Wing, Karl & Stuart take on the formidable C-Wing where the unhappy spirits of past residents are said to roam.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Guys Cliffe House Pt1
programme.desc: The formidable visage of Guys Cliff House, a once great home, is awe inspiring, as are the stories pf paranormal activity within. Now home to the Masonic fraternity it is home to two temples and many lodges and chapters.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Guys Cliffe House Pt2
programme.desc: The lower Temple in this once great, but now ruined castle, is steeped in history and tales pf ghostly happenings. Stuart investigates a room that is said to house multiple spirits and feels something is watching him in the dark.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Wall, The Chalkboard, The Getaway, The Prescription, Summer Camp.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: House of Shadows, One Hand in the Till, Teasdale's Motor Car, The Vision and the Grave.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 2
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Viewing, The Subway, Kid in the Closet, Justice is Served, The Tractor.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: E-Mail, Blood Donor, Epitaph, Stiches in Time, Soldier.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Moonstruck Beach, Healing Hands, Aspen Sunny Side, Night Walker, Hot Car.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demons Never Die
programme.desc: Shortly after starting a new job and moving his family to the suburbs, Bill Toler suspects his house is haunted. Paranormal investigators uncover a portal in their home and discover a demon followed Bill home from his job at the state penitentiary.

programme.title: A Haunting: House of Nightmares
programme.desc: When Tracey Berrios experiences paranormal activity inside her new home, she suspects spirits tied to the house's history. But after something evil attacks Tracey, she fears for the safety of her family and turns to paranormal investigators for help.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Romie moves into a new home but begins to have nightmares and see shadowy spirits pacing.

programme.title: A Haunting: Nightmare In The Attic
programme.desc: The Fox family moves into a large old house in Lowell, Arkansas. Soon after, an angry ghost and demon begin to target the children, in their waking hours and in their dreams. The Fox family turns to a psychic, who confirms their worst nightmares.

programme.title: A Haunting: Masks Of Terror
programme.desc: Jeanette Osborne treats herself to a set of Haitian masks to decorate her California dream home. But shortly after, strange activity leads her to conclude that the masks are to blame.

programme.title: A Haunting: Shape Of Evil
programme.desc: Jay Yaple persuades his wife that Enfield, CT, is the perfect place for them. After a series of unexplained events, Jay discovers the house has a dark history of mysterious deaths. Anyone who attempts to come to their aid is driven away by the demon.
